name: Marco Rubio
subject: I hate that I am writing this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I just can't believe this.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I just can't believe this.

We had so many people reach out...

From Donald Trump Jr. to Mike Pompeo to Elise Stefanik to my Political Director, Matt, we had SO many people take time to chat with you about my Quarter 2 deadline.

While our results were good, my opponent's results were better. I can't believe I am saying this, but she actually outraised me since she launched her campaign in June. She was able to raise $4.6 MILLION in record time.

I am so disappointed. I really thought Team Marco was stronger than this.

We can't let this happen again. If we fall any further behind, we risk losing everything we worked so hard to achieve the past four years. Her numbers just GOT released, and even though I'm a little worried, I know we can work hard to surpass my opponent's numbers in Quarter 3. July and August have historically been slow, but that doesn't mean we can't prove those trends wrong. Now is the time to get started, we can't afford to waste any more time.

_**[I need YOU, Peter.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=efe2881693da4af7b219d5f9d024cffd&_e=OR3KgvvINli5IoU2X-AzDDNGzym_U9qLtHUE9jhBJig8yhAJ6WJfBfy7hQtzDjqjyQTT4AwOo6U_Z7X3gVjLnAZ-xEosVdxQlTm7yCicgZX-CJ8fgtdEv4ff6Qhbh6SzTOFQkagpQnWcuDoHFy_EyMDlfxtoEg6nN2XE7oAicZ6FOGCcFuf3uE8j_utiLfn4yuj27zJOT-gbeqml8pFbLlFOY8G3eG-uhcesq66gKkHZqnh-pZg6rLYTSjU9W2H-L41HZlxgSzgtZgfnwIL40SKJyISXUB_vKpIUQi9uuqKywz4ENCmWxZNNzQ0KZayaoB39jli96oHdKN5lF8aaujhdAGx_02MH-LUIHT8qcjLoyEwsK-Q4XZNPvcGC81WZgde4nBVOjAkhNnKJHmPeh2BeK7j_WCi2lwK0kQRGMoR9BB2gefUbjXeKu6GE75YU_aW1ZrrORWoMBVuMSQUqfLuTUxWDPssjd5WlCVzSINqchf6I99Nr5wJriMCSYu4J "I need YOU, Peter. body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57977614:JS2_dnl3N:m:1:3103520637:382193400B938B8088D14A7C9242E058:r "Headline") Peter, Nancy Pelosi and the socialists in Congress are obsessed with **DESTROYING President Trump**. He stood up to the Socialist Swamp trying to destroy this great nation, _and they will never forgive him for it._ Their latest witch-hunt is just another attempt to perpetrate fraud on the American people and force us into their socialist nightmare. **[You can see my full reaction here.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57977614:JS2_dnl3N:m:1:3103520637:382193400B938B8088D14A7C9242E058:r "You
can see my full reaction here.")** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57977614:JS2_dnl3N:m:1:3103520637:382193400B938B8088D14A7C9242E058:r "Watch the Video")**With everything going on in our nation, Nancy Pelosi is spending more taxpayer money on a new "commission" to investigate President Trump - _AGAIN!_** **THEN they will march around this nation in 2022 and use that circus to try and keep control of the House and Senate. They will slander a true patriot simply to hold onto power. IT IS ANOTHER WITCH-HUNT.** **[We cannot allow this to happen- you need to help me fight back and stop Nancy Pelosi's next witch-hunt.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57977614:JS2_dnl3N:m:1:3103520637:382193400B938B8088D14A7C9242E058:r "We cannot allow this to happen
– you need to help me fight back and stop Nancy Pelosi's next witch-hunt.")** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57977614:JS2_dnl3N:m:1:3103520637:382193400B938B8088D14A7C9242E058:r "Speed Bump")It is clear the radical socialists in Washington will stop at nothing to keep their hold on our lives and will stop anyone who stands in their way - someone like me. **I'm Congressman Mo Brooks, and I'm running for Senate in the great state of Alabama where I 've been endorsed by President Trump, Senator Rand Paul, Senate Conservatives Fund, Club for Growth, the American Conservative Union, Mark Levine and now I'm seeking your endorsement.** When we win this race, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer will KNOW that there is another real conservative to contend with in the Senate - not another Mitt Romney RINO who is scared of being unpopular on Twitter. **[That is why it is so critical that you join President Trump and these great conservatives in support of my campaign for the U.S. Senate.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57977614:JS2_dnl3N:m:1:3103520637:382193400B938B8088D14A7C9242E058:r "That is why it is so critical that you join President Trump and
these great conservatives in support of my campaign for the U.S. Senate.")** If we let these socialists get away with their scheme, **_it will destroy America as we know it._** They will:
* Defund our police,
* Rig our elections,
* Spend trillions of dollars that we don't have, have to borrow to get, and can't afford to pay back,
* Grant citizenship to eleven million illegal aliens,
* Make lockdowns standard anytime Biden or liberal governors impose them,
* Open the borders, close the churches, and let Antifa terrorists rule our streets.

**[We need to fight, and we need to win- we can't do that without your support.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57977614:JS2_dnl3N:m:1:3103520637:382193400B938B8088D14A7C9242E058:r "We need to fight, and we need to win – we can't do that
without your support.")** Please help me end the new Pelosi hoax before she gets away with destroying a great American who gave up so much fighting for this nation. For America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57977614:JS2_dnl3N:m:1:3103520637:382193400B938B8088D14A7C9242E058:r "Mo Brooks")
Mo Brooks
Conservative Candidate for Senate P.S. Pelosi and her socialist goons will do anything to destroy President Trump and the Republican Party, including violating the law and common decency. Ending their tyranny will only become a reality if true patriots like you join forces with President Trump and me--it's our only hope. **[You need to decide right now if you will stand with me or sit down and let the liberals destroy this nation.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57977614:JS2_dnl3N:m:1:3103520637:382193400B938B8088D14A7C9242E058:r "You need to decide right now if you will stand with me or sit down and let the liberals destroy this nation.")** | | [STAND WITH TRUMP & MO »](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57977614:JS2_dnl3N:m:1:3103520637:382193400B938B8088D14A7C9242E058:r "STAND WITH TRUMP & MO")

body:
**It 's time for Dr. Fauci to find another job.** **[Chip in if you agree!>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57980556:6E8tinlJN:m:1:3253819041:7CBAC32CCAE1DBABB15777C42B852086:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57980556:6E8tinlJN:m:1:3253819041:7CBAC32CCAE1DBABB15777C42B852086:r) | |
---
Peter,

On May 11th, Dr. Fauci lied to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

That simply isn't true and I gave Dr. Fauci the chance to retract his statements in our Senate hearing today.

No surprise, he stood by his lies.

subject: FWD: A Mother and a Businesswoman
body:
Tina Ramirez for Congress

Become a FOUNDING MEMBER of our campaign

Peter,

It's been just under a month since Tina launched her campaign for
Congress and the support has been TREMENDOUS!

We have accomplished so much since the launch of the campaign and
as the Republican front-runner, we are on track to DEFEAT our
pro-choice, pro-critical race theory, and anti-gun opponent
Abigail Spanberger.

And on election night, when we win, Tina will know that the list
of supporters who have stood with her from the beginning were the
key to our victory.

Will you step up and become a Founding Member of the Tina Ramirez
Campaign for U.S. Congress?

TEAM TINA FOUNDING MEMBER

FOUNDING MEMBER NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.comMEMBERSHIP FEE: $30DEADLINE: 11:59
PM TONIGHTFOUNDING MEMBER STATUS: INACTIVEBECOME A FOUNDING
MEMBER

CONTRIBUTE $500

CONTRIBUTE $250

CONTRIBUTE $100

CONTRIBUTE $50

CONTRIBUTE $30

When you become a Founding Member not
only will you be the first to receive exclusive campaign updates,
but we will also rely on your thoughts to help shape our
campaign.

Are you ready to become a Founding MemberPeter?

Please make a contribution of $30 before 11:59 PM TONIGHT to
become a Founding Member. >>

Thank you,
Team Tina
TinaRamirez.com

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tina Ramirez
Subject: A Mother and a Businesswoman
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter,

It has been my life goal to help people find freedom around the
world.

>From being raised by Air Force veterans, becoming a high-school
teacher, starting the Congressional International Religious
Freedom Caucus, to founding Hardwired Global, and now my current
mission.

My passion for service, freedom, and work with people worldwide
has led me here.

I AM RUNNING FOR VIRGINIA'S 7TH
CONGRESSIONAL SEAT

As a single mother and business
owner, I know what hard work looks like. And here's what WE will
be working towards:

Protecting the Sanctity of Life
Ensuring our Religious Freedom
Opposing "Cancel Culture"
Stopping Critical Race Theory and Promoting School Choice
Reforming the System for our Veterans
Defending the Second Amendment
Securing our Election

CONTRIBUTE TOWARDS THE RAMIREZ
CAMPAIGN

This will be an uphill battle, but I
know that together we can win this! No longer can we stand by as
Spanberger continues to hurt the people of Virginia's 7th
congressional district.

Let's win this together,

Tina Ramirez
Republican Candidate
Virginia's 7th Congressional District

CONTRIBUTE TOWARDS THE RAMIREZ
CAMPAIGN

Congress, Inc., All rights reserved.

| | Derek, President Biden is coming to Virginia for a campaign event this Friday. I’m honored to have his support and to welcome him to the campaign trail as we take on Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate together.

Joe’s coming to Virginia because he understands just how close this election will be. He knows just how important it is to stop Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump from rolling back Virginia’s progress.

**That’s why I’m launching an immediate goal of raising $100,000 exclusively in grassroots contributions by midnight on Friday.**

Last year, I was proud to lead Virginia’s effort to elect Joe Biden and fire Donald Trump.

Now Trump is trying to make a comeback. He’s endorsed Youngkin three different times, promising that Glenn will “Make Virginia Great Again.”

**Trump thinks Virginia is going to give him more power and momentum in the Republican Party.**

By coming to Virginia, Joe Biden is sending the message that he’s ready to do everything he can to stop Trumpism once and for all. When I see Joe on Friday, I want to be able to say we’re doing the same thing.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Why Justice Breyer’s retirement is key to the future of the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

A few months ago, I became the first member of Congress to call on Justice Stephen Breyer to retire from the Supreme Court. It’s not something I did lightly, but it remains a necessary step to saving our democracy.
**Today, I’d like to renew that call, and to explain why this is so important — especially right now.**
Throughout his nearly 30 years on the Supreme Court, Justice Breyer has supported racial equity and reproductive justice, and remained a stalwart champion for a strong and healthy democracy. I admire his ability to uphold the law while maintaining moral clarity both as an American and as a lawyer.
Right now, the best way for Justice Breyer to demonstrate that commitment to justice is for him to retire. This will allow President Biden to appoint a successor who will carry on Justice Breyer’s legacy by protecting the right to vote, reproductive rights, and equality for racial minorities and LGBTQ+ people.
Remember, Mitch McConnell has proven that he has no qualms about exploiting loopholes in Senate procedure to ram through conservative justices’ nominations. (That is, of course, how we ended up with Justices Brett Kavanaugh and Amy Coney Barrett.)
By retiring, Justice Breyer can block the possibility of a 7-2 conservative majority on the court, which could throw Americans’ civil liberties even further into jeopardy for generations to come.
Of course, I recognize that Justice Breyer’s retirement will not fix everything that’s wrong with the Roberts Court. I remain committed to abolishing the filibuster and passing legislation to add four seats to the Supreme Court to restore ideological balance. That way, we can avoid begging individual justices to retire for the sake of our democracy every few years.
Thank you for reading,
Mondaire

* * *
Mondaire Jones is committed to abolishing the filibuster, passing legislation to expand the Supreme Court, and saving our democracy.
But Congressional Republicans will fight him every step of the way, so he needs your support.
**[Can you pitch in $5 or more to show your support for Mondaire as he works to expand the court to protect voting rights, civil liberties, and more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32746780/296734151/-1167945813?refcode2=205f138c-31ea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210721-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDVmMTM4Yy0zMWVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RwijXhpKiBZ-CFiJBvWvjFEW-fSZO68FLPuHMN6Th70=)**

name: Keystone Progress Education Fund
subject: Fighting for a progressive future.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=072121le [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=072121le]

Dear Friend,

At Keystone Progress, we're fighting against oppressive and harmful policies and systems in Pennsylvania -- and need you to join us.

By empowering Pennsylvanians, we're battling efforts by conservative legislators to restrict our voting and abortion rights. We're fighting back against laws that disadvantage communities of color and threaten Pennsylvanians’ public health, safety, education, and our state's infrastructure.

At Keystone Progress Education Fund we are hard at work on the ground, rallying for justice and equity.

We have led vaccination access drives in marginalized communities and are building dedicated get-out-the-vote organizing efforts in areas that have proven to make a difference in voter turnout. We host regular events, panels, discussions, and activities to educate, coalition-build, and to empower locally-led organizing efforts in areas where residents don't often receive this kind of support.

By equipping our fellow Pennsylvanians with the tools necessary to advocate for a progressive future that works for ALL, we will win these fights to shape a future that works for everyone.

We must work together to make this happen. That's why we're asking you to please donate to the Keystone Progress Education Fund today, to help us grow our efforts to secure a progressive future in

Pennsylvania. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=072121le]

Thank you for helping us make a real difference in the Keystone State.

Keystone Progress Education Fund

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Friend,
The WVDP is truly humbled and grateful for your continued support. We couldn’t do it without you. But there is still so much important work to be done, and our efforts today (and everyday) will ultimately dictate our success in 2022. As part of our Build Back Blue program, we need to register at least 10,000 new or purged Democratic voters before the 2022 elections. Can we count on your continued support? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Elections are not won overnight, and progress is the result of consistent, organized and intentional effort each and every day. This is how we move the needle towards a future with more decency and opportunity for West Virginians.
Can you please make a donation today so that we can keep the momentum going? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you!
Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP

body:
**It 's time for Dr. Fauci to find another job.** **[Chip in if you agree!>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57980595:JutgnnlNh:m:1:3253819041:6374EEDEE226EED9AE11DF5E3EB1B537:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57980595:JutgnnlNh:m:1:3253819041:6374EEDEE226EED9AE11DF5E3EB1B537:r) | |
---
Peter,

On May 11th, Dr. Fauci lied to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

That simply isn't true and I gave Dr. Fauci the chance to retract his statements in our Senate hearing today.

No surprise, he stood by his lies.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57980595:JutgnnlNh:m:1:3253819041:6374EEDEE226EED9AE11DF5E3EB1B537:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57980595:JutgnnlNh:m:1:3253819041:6374EEDEE226EED9AE11DF5E3EB1B537:r)
It's never been more clear that Dr. Fauci believes he's invincible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. _

I'm leading the charge to #FIREFAUCI and hold him accountable for lying to Congress, misleading the public, and for his well-documented role in providing funds to the Wuhan Lab in China so they can create bioweapons like COVID-19.

Will you join my fight by chipping in now?

**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57980595:JutgnnlNh:m:1:3253819041:6374EEDEE226EED9AE11DF5E3EB1B537:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57980595:JutgnnlNh:m:1:3253819041:6374EEDEE226EED9AE11DF5E3EB1B537:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57980595:JutgnnlNh:m:1:3253819041:6374EEDEE226EED9AE11DF5E3EB1B537:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57980595:JutgnnlNh:m:1:3253819041:6374EEDEE226EED9AE11DF5E3EB1B537:r)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**

Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he's doing.

He's not an expert in COVID. He's an expert in political theater!

You can see that every time he's in front of the microphone.

* He still says he doesn't know the role China played in the pandemic.
* He denies he supported gain of function research despite the paper trail that _proves he did._
* He claims to "trusts the science" but repeatedly denies it in favor of theatrics and dramatic attacks.

He dances around it, but we know the truth. We've seen the documents. We've read the emails. We've watched the COVID hysteria unfold over the past 18 months.

Not only was he flat-out wrong about the virus, but he's also continuously lied to the American public and demonstrated poor judgment.

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It's time for Fauci TO GO.

**That's why I'm putting my foot down and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2615210-raf/ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57980595:JutgnnlNh:m:1:3253819041:6374EEDEE226EED9AE11DF5E3EB1B537:r)**

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength and support against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy. **[Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57980595:JutgnnlNh:m:1:3253819041:6374EEDEE226EED9AE11DF5E3EB1B537:r)

**
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Team Malcolm
subject: We need all hands on deck to compete against wealthy, self-funded opponents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Our opponent loaned his campaign nearly half a million dollars
#

**$1,007,583**
That's how much money our Jeff Bartos, our far-right Republican opponent, reported raising last quarter.
**$440,000**
That's how much Jeff reported loaning to his campaign to spend in this race — he dropped nearly half a million dollars of his own money to try and buy this seat!
**$3**
That's how much we're asking you to donate to our campaign today to elect a true working-class champion as Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator.
It may not seem like the kind of money that can compete with our opponent's self-funding, but by the time you read this sentence, someone has already chipped in $5.
**Now they're hoping you'll do the same. Because that's how we're going to win this race — together.**
We're incredibly grateful and proud to be running a campaign fueled by working people, with an average contribution of $28.
We can flip Pennsylvania's Senate seat and send Malcolm to Washington to be a voice for working people, but we need all hands on deck to compete against wealthy, self-funded opponents.
[So we have to ask: Friend, can you make a $3 donation to our campaign to elect Malcolm Kenyatta today? We're counting on an overwhelming number of small-dollar donations from working people to win this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32753278/296752166/-353695395?refcode2=1829bab8-3cea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210721-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODI5YmFiOC0zY2VhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cX8lnuG7DV95yCFIFykE1x_9H0XJDiiE7jfsbhuA160=)

name: Charlie Crist
subject: my take on the new child tax credits
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
They should remind all of us what's possible when Democrats win elections.
|
---

| | Friend,

The American Rescue Plan was a fantastic piece of legislation for a lot of reasons, one of the biggest being the expanded Child Tax Credit. One analysis predicts that it's going to **cut child poverty nearly in half.** It should remind all of us what's possible when Democrats win elections.

Millions of families across the country are getting a leg up. But in Florida, there's so much more we can do. Gov. DeSantis isn't working to help Florida's families, he doesn't listen, he doesn't care. ****[I'm going to do everything I can to defeat him, but I can't do it without your support. Can you make a contribution now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/lmtuTN0k-QR3ZwvZGHJb8g==/23m9e1K2bcmt4UkJsYXK9w==?refcode=20210721_f_1_fl&amount=20)**** | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
[DONATE $5](https://act.myngp.com/el/lmtuTN0k-QR3ZwvZGHJb8g==/23m9e1K2bcmt4UkJsYXK9w==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210721_f_1_fl&amount=5)
[DONATE $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/lmtuTN0k-QR3ZwvZGHJb8g==/23m9e1K2bcmt4UkJsYXK9w==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210721_f_1_fl&amount=25)
[DONATE $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/lmtuTN0k-QR3ZwvZGHJb8g==/23m9e1K2bcmt4UkJsYXK9w==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210721_f_1_fl&amount=50)
[DONATE $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/lmtuTN0k-QR3ZwvZGHJb8g==/23m9e1K2bcmt4UkJsYXK9w==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210721_f_1_fl&amount=100)
[OTHER](https://act.myngp.com/el/lmtuTN0k-QR3ZwvZGHJb8g==/23m9e1K2bcmt4UkJsYXK9w==?refcode=20210721_f_1_fl)
When COVID-19 came to Florida, Gov. DeSantis refused to take action to protect our communities, and then he **put wealthy neighborhoods first** when it came to vaccine distribution. Now, he refuses to step up the outreach needed to get more Floridians vaccinated so that we're _all_ protected.

When news broke that more Floridians had been arrested in connection with the January 6th insurrection than residents of any other state, Gov. DeSantis had the opportunity to help find out why with the stroke of a pen. But **he refuses** to form the bipartisan commission needed to get the facts.

And when Republicans around the country realized that they could gain an edge by passing **draconian voter suppression laws,** Gov. Ron DeSantis happily joined in. For DeSantis, vaccinating our families and protecting our communities from hate aren't priorities -- but making it harder for you to vote is.

****[I'm running to defeat Gov. DeSantis and help build a Florida where everyone can get ahead. But I need your support to win this race and advance our shared Democratic priorities. Will you pitch in just $5 to help?](https://act.myngp.com/el/lmtuTN0k-QR3ZwvZGHJb8g==/23m9e1K2bcmt4UkJsYXK9w==?refcode=20210721_f_1_fl&amount=5)****

Thank you,

Charlie Crist

****

---
---
Hi, I am Bob Nicholson, the Volunteer Coordinator for Mark Pukita’s campaign for US Senate in 2022. Mark needs some help this Thursday through Sunday. Last weekend, Mark began his "Make Fairs Great Again" tour. He had a great time at fairs in Logan, Madison, Clinton, and Montgomery counties. To conclude the mini-tour, Mark made a stop by the Miami Valley Steam Threshers. This week (July 22-25), Mark is visiting more fairs and would love it if you could join him walking around, meeting folks, and having fun. We would like to get a few volunteers at each fair. It is a great way to help Mark.
---
---
These are the fairs Mark will be attending and the times he plans to be at each:
* **Thursday, July 22** \- Carroll County Fair – 2-4 PM
* **Friday, July 23** – (1) Warren County Fair 12-4 PM, (2) Clark County Fair 6-9 PM
* **Saturday, July 24 - Franklin** County Fair 10 AM – 1 PM
* **Sunday, July 25 -** Clermont County Fair (& Parade) 1-4 PM

If you can help, please reply, and let me know which fair(s) and times work for you. We will give you a t-shirt so please tell me your t-shirt size in your reply. Thanks, Bob (volunteers@mark4ohio.com)
---

clean_body: | Hi, I am Bob Nicholson, the Volunteer Coordinator for Mark Pukita’s campaign for US Senate in 2022. Mark needs some help this Thursday through Sunday. Last weekend, Mark began his "Make Fairs Great Again" tour. He had a great time at fairs in Logan, Madison, Clinton, and Montgomery counties. To conclude the mini-tour, Mark made a stop by the Miami Valley Steam Threshers. This week (July 22-25), Mark is visiting more fairs and would love it if you could join him walking around, meeting folks, and having fun. We would like to get a few volunteers at each fair. It is a great way to help Mark. These are the fairs Mark will be attending and the times he plans to be at each: Thursday, July 22 \- Carroll County Fair – 2-4 PM Friday, July 23 – (1) Warren County Fair 12-4 PM, (2) Clark County Fair 6-9 PM Saturday, July 24 - Franklin County Fair 10 AM – 1 PM Sunday, July 25 - Clermont County Fair (& Parade) 1-4 PM If you can help, please reply, and let me know which fair(s) and times work for you. We will give you a t-shirt so please tell me your t-shirt size in your reply. Thanks, Bob (volunteers@mark4ohio.com) | Mark Pukita for US Senate 2022 Committee, 4467 Donegal Cliffs Drive, Dublin, Ohio 43107, USA, (614) 946-0949

name: Team Franchot
subject: Volunteer with Team Franchot
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
Peter Franchot is running for Governor to bring the big ideas and practical solutions that we need to bounce back from this pandemic even stronger than before. Under his administration, he’s going to make Maryland known nationwide as a bastion of economic and social fairness. He plans to restore trust in the competence of state government, create 100,000 new jobs in industries of the future, address the student debt crisis, and so much more.
But in order to get there, we’re going to need your help. Will you sign up to volunteer with our campaign to help make Peter Franchot’s bold vision for Maryland’s future a reality? [https://www.franchot.com/action]
Every weekend from now to Election Day, we’ll be doing the critical work to build our growing coalition -- and grassroots supporters like you are at the center of our efforts. From knocking on doors, to phone-banking, to sharing the latest campaign updates on social media, to hosting a virtual watch party and more, there are many ways for you to get involved with our action-packed and community-oriented campaign.
https://www.franchot.com/action [https://www.franchot.com/action]With our state opening back up, now is a great time to join our people-powered movement and meet like-minded volunteers who want to help secure a better and brighter future for Maryland’s communities. We have many events planned in the coming weeks and months, and we hope you will be able to join us!
Together, we’re going to change the way that government does business in 2022. Click here to sign up to volunteer with Team Franchot. [https://www.franchot.com/action]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em072121]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

body:

Friend,

On May 11th, Dr. Fauci lied to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

That simply isn't true and I gave Dr. Fauci the chance to retract his statements in our Senate hearing today.

No surprise, he stood by his lies.

It's never been more clear that Dr. Fauci believes he's invincible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. _

I'm leading the charge to #FIREFAUCI and hold him accountable for lying to Congress, misleading the public, and for his well-documented role in providing funds to the Wuhan Lab in China so they can create bioweapons like COVID-19.

Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he’s doing.

He’s not an expert in COVID. He’s an expert in political theater!

You can see that every time he’s in front of the microphone.

* He still says he doesn’t know the role China played in the pandemic.
* He denies he supported gain of function research despite the paper trail that _proves he did._
* He claims to “trusts the science” but repeatedly denies it in favor of theatrics and dramatic attacks.

He dances around it, but we know the truth. We’ve seen the documents. We’ve read the emails. We’ve watched the COVID hysteria unfold over the past 18 months.

Not only was he flat-out wrong about the virus, but he’s also continuously lied to the American public and demonstrated poor judgment.

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It’s time for Fauci TO GO.

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength and support against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy. **[Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4282%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tG0lMbkDxpwpTcC1P5hq9Q&sysid=1)

Rand Paul

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Leslie Knope got it right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

In case you didn't know, July is National Parks and Recreation month!

Leslie Knope got it right, Peter. Our parks (both national and state) are a critical part of our country's infrastructure. They protect and preserve our natural resources, provide economic opportunity for the nearby communities, and remind us of the importance and beauty of our environment.

Last year, I was proud to support the Great American Outdoors Act - which permanently and fully funds the Land and Water Conservation Fund and provides critical funding to repair and preserve our national parks. This year, Congress needs to continue addressing the infrastructure needs on our public lands - both for the sake of our environment and the rural communities that are the center of our state's outdoor recreation economy.

The Olympic Peninsula is my home. Our children and grandchildren and GREAT grandchildren deserve the chance to experience it the way we did.

**[If you agree with me (and Leslie Knope) that we should protect and preserve our national parks, will you add your name next to mine?](https://act.myngp.com/el/k-LxhBmTQIXnpStt2M-toCYXQ4vHA6l5YhSpZ2ZAHOE=/k9jZzZL07WAl1Bc6AdgrLP__YXqVUa-FXpLdc6tX_Lg=?gpsid=50_115_19827&ms=em21_210721_NatPrk_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210721_NatPrk_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210721_NatPrk_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/k-LxhBmTQIXnpStt2M-toCYXQ4vHA6l5YhSpZ2ZAHOE=/UnKmyy9bTG-dBHXw--BwLR0G2EyoyTlgVps7tDRz7X8=?gpsid=50_115_19828&refcode=em21_210721_NatPrk_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210721_NatPrk_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)
---

Tacoma WA 98402 United States

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Results from our Focus Group:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We just finished reviewing the results from our Q3 Grassroots Focus Group and wanted to share some of the toplines with you.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210721-2051-header&t=1&akid=2051%2E434096%2EbcDuPE)
Peter,
We just finished reviewing the results from our Q3 Grassroots Focus Group and wanted to share some of the topline results with you.
Altogether, our Focus Group received over 70,000 responses from a truly representative sample of folks from your state and across the country — a huge success in our book! [**_Before you read the official Focus Group results, can you please click here and make a $5 donation to our campaign?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23377?refcode=em20210721-2051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2051%2E434096%2EbcDuPE)
Q3 Grassroots Focus Group: Topline Results
* **A majority of our Focus Group participants (64.78%) listed "Jobs and income equality" as the top issue they want John Fetterman to focus on.** John has always understood the dignity of work, which is why he is fighting to raise the minimum wage and protect the union way of life.

* **An impressive 46.19% of Focus Group participants indicated that they want our campaign to prioritize "Building organizing tools for our volunteers" in the coming months.** We hear you loud and clear and will reach out about volunteer opportunities soon.

* **Overall, 78.31% of Focus Group participants rated the trajectory of our campaign as "Good" or "Very Good."** We couldn’t be more grateful to read this result. Thank you for believing in our campaign, especially during these critical first few months of this highly competitive Democratic primary.

---
To be totally candid with you, Peter, we were pretty pleased to receive these results and every single thoughtful response.
But if the responses to our Q3 Grassroots Focus Group prove anything, it’s that **we can’t get complacent and we can’t take anything for granted.** Especially not when Pennsylvania is expected to be the #1 most competitive Senate race in the country.
[**_With this in mind, can you please make a $5 donation to our campaign today? In order to keep growing our campaign during these critical first few months of the Democratic primary, we must keep up the fundraising momentum. Your donation today will have a direct and immediate impact on our success._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23377?refcode=em20210721-2051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2051%2E434096%2EbcDuPE)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23377?refcode=em20210721-2051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2051%2E434096%2EbcDuPE)**
Signing off for now,
Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210721-2051-footer&t=23&refcode2=2051_434096_bcDuPE&akid=2051%2E434096%2EbcDuPE)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=2051%2E434096%2EbcDuPE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2051%2E434096%2EbcDuPE)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Hello there, During a speech in rural Texas last week, I was interrupted by a person who shouted at me to leave. Do you know what I said? **“I will not be shouted down.”** What I meant is that I will go to every single county to fight to earn your vote. Instead of backing down and taking you for granted, I will show up for you. clean_body: | Hello there, During a speech in rural Texas last week, I was interrupted by a person who shouted at me to leave. Do you know what I said? “I will not be shouted down.” What I meant is that I will go to every single county to fight to earn your vote. Instead of backing down and taking you for granted, I will show up for you. We will talk about solving problems, because Republicans have lied to voters time and time again. After all, when was the last time Texas Republicans talked about rural hospitals closing, fixing the damn power grid, or investing in our underfunded schools? So while my opponents try to silence me, I will continue to reach out to every voter about my plans to address our state's biggest challenges, and I will talk about the issues that matter most. Our people-powered movement isn’t going anywhere. Will you stand with me by pitching in $5 or any amount you can afford to help my team take the fight to all 254 counties? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = For too long, politicians who would rather please their wealthy donors and corporate lobbyists have neglected Texan voters. That’s why we’re building a grassroots movement of folks all across the state to bring our shared Texas values to the office. Thank you for everything you do, — Mike The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Stefanie Sass
subject: Women in the lead
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends—

Florida Republican leaders just can’t stand when highly qualified women speak up and demand better.

That’s why they’re doubling down on attacks against Nikki and Rep. Val Demings. They know that Val and Nikki can win next year.

These attacks won’t stop anytime soon, friends, so I’m asking directly for your help. Please click here to chip in and help us fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-frontrunner-attacks]

The GOP has relied on attacks like these for years--and under Trump, it got worse. We know that they’ll keep attacking qualified women who speak up and fight for change.

And we know that with supporters like you, we can fight back and win this race.

Friends, we need to be ready for whatever they throw our way. If you’re with us, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-frontrunner-attacks]

Florida Republicans are on the offensive because they’re scared. Nikki is the only Democrat to win statewide in Florida since 2012, and they know she can do it again next year.

They’ll stop at nothing to protect Ron DeSantis, and we need to be ready for their attacks.

If you’re ready to help us fight back and stop Ron DeSantis, please click here to chip in now and help us win next year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-big-stakes]

Thanks,

Stefanie Sass
Finance Director

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A National Republican Super PAC just spent another $1 MILLION against us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Friends – I have an important ask to make, and Maggie said I could reach out to you as one of her top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. **One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, recently dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.** We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal. That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back. **And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:** **[If you are able, will you split a $5 donation between our people-powered campaign and Maggie’s? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32757969/296771084/1696179105?refcode=e20210721-mk-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmY1MGUyZC00OGVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CkeT30MwnB7HB4YIFpfpOBkSngLnKgL0GS_XKEHtoNM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32757970/296771085/1696179105?refcode=e20210721-mk-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmY1MGUyZC00OGVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CkeT30MwnB7HB4YIFpfpOBkSngLnKgL0GS_XKEHtoNM=)

clean_body: President Trump is serious about securing our border, Peter. | Peter, In our nation’s history, we have never seen a Border Security Disaster like what is currently taking place along our Southern Border. People are flooding into this country like you wouldn’t believe. All Joe Biden had to do was maintain President Trump’s America First Immigration Plan and Finish The Wall -- but he didn’t. The Democrats opened the border and put our nation at risk. That’s why he recently announced his Trump Wall Defense Task Force -- a select group of Grassroots Republicans fighting to Stop The Left and SAVE AMERICA. | | | | | | FACT: we have no idea who is coming into this country, Peter. That’s entirely unacceptable! A nation without borders is no nation at all. That’s why we need PRESIDENT TRUMP’S TOP SUPPORTERS to step up and fight back against Joe Biden’s Border Crisis. Is that you, Peter? | Thank you. Donald J. Trump Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Tom
subject: I’m running to break the current system and ensure that everyone, regardless of whether they own a damn spaceship, pays their fair share in taxes.
disclaimer_text: paid for by mistreated employees, displaced American workers and shuttered small businesses left in Amazon’s wake
body:
---
| | Yesterday, two things happened. One was incredibly routine and happens all the time, and the other hasn’t happened for _50 years_.

**The Former:** Jeff Bezos took his rocket barely into space (_something NASA and the U.S. Government routinely does every year since 1961_).

**The Latter: The Bucks won their first title since 1971!**

Now, I’m more excited about the latter. But, in all seriousness, it’s important to recognize that the rocket Jeff Bezos took to the edge of the atmosphere was **paid for by mistreated employees, displaced American workers and shuttered small businesses left in Amazon’s wake.**

If this doesn't make you furious, I don’t know what to tell you. The game is rigged, but we can change it. [Add your name to stand with me and demand the rich pay their fair share in taxes >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32759301/296775261/-1518213971?refcode=TN_EM_PT_1MO_210721_1_1&refcode2=248e7a02-4dea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhlN2EwMi00ZGVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z33Ojom6PqlgZQnUjd7rtGcXsn85t0clQeXFfCXqYC8=&emci=710d2eb3-4cea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=248e7a02-4dea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925) | | [Tax The Rich](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32759302/296775262/-1518213971?refcode=TN_EM_PT_1MO_210721_1_1&refcode2=248e7a02-4dea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhlN2EwMi00ZGVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z33Ojom6PqlgZQnUjd7rtGcXsn85t0clQeXFfCXqYC8=&emci=710d2eb3-4cea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=248e7a02-4dea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)
---
Remember, Jeff Bezos pays virtually no income tax. In fact, he’s probably paying less in taxes than you or me. Don’t forget about this headline from last month:

_“The Secret IRS Files: Trove of Never-Before-Seen Records Reveal How the Wealthiest Avoid Income Tax”_
---

While billionaires can fund vanity projects like going to space, we’re stuck down here paying more in taxes than them. _Remember, if the rich paid their fair share, we could easily pay for public goods like updated infrastructure or widespread broadband access. Goods that everyone could enjoy and which businesses also need to be successful._

**I’m running to break the current system and ensure that everyone,_regardless of whether they own a damn spaceship_ , pays their fair share in taxes.**

[Add your name if you feel the same way >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32759303/296775263/-1518213971?refcode=TN_EM_PT_1MO_210721_1_1&refcode2=248e7a02-4dea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhlN2EwMi00ZGVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z33Ojom6PqlgZQnUjd7rtGcXsn85t0clQeXFfCXqYC8=&emci=710d2eb3-4cea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=248e7a02-4dea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)

Thank you for hearing me out!

Tom Nelson

|

clean_body: | | Yesterday, two things happened. One was incredibly routine and happens all the time, and the other hasn’t happened for 50 years. The Former: Jeff Bezos took his rocket barely into space (something NASA and the U.S. Government routinely does every year since 1961). The Latter: The Bucks won their first title since 1971! Now, I’m more excited about the latter. But, in all seriousness, it’s important to recognize that the rocket Jeff Bezos took to the edge of the atmosphere was paid for by mistreated employees, displaced American workers and shuttered small businesses left in Amazon’s wake. If this doesn't make you furious, I don’t know what to tell you. The game is rigged, but we can change it. | | Remember, Jeff Bezos pays virtually no income tax. In fact, he’s probably paying less in taxes than you or me. Don’t forget about this headline from last month: “The Secret IRS Files: Trove of Never-Before-Seen Records Reveal How the Wealthiest Avoid Income Tax” While billionaires can fund vanity projects like going to space, we’re stuck down here paying more in taxes than them. Remember, if the rich paid their fair share, we could easily pay for public goods like updated infrastructure or widespread broadband access. Goods that everyone could enjoy and which businesses also need to be successful. I’m running to break the current system and ensure that everyone,regardless of whether they own a damn spaceship , pays their fair share in taxes. Thank you for hearing me out! Tom Nelson | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

| Friend,

Kat joined Fox Business to discuss her visit to the border with 6 Florida Sheriffs. During her visit, she witnessed the "Most Expensive Welcome to America Party '' that we have ever seen.
National Guard, Border Patrol, and Texas DPS are forced to stand by as Coyotes bring people into America before arresting and processing them into detention facilities. [Kat is ready to secure our border, are you with her?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016YTwYQrM04-2EYioR6VjmabzlC8ux5SmM2eT6NVbVbq0xKdh2veIXYiQFhwMmNrSKexnIR3i0pyHS_cSQf4cWkcyGYH7b_wgj0_S_VpgTyDpyBDI_916GWlMXBbH1_v06fP3Lw1A7zq5RRjSaRlEehJiw7EiaPvzXzRF86tPoeABjhhoyAEAl8r7FZg216ci&c=enGqj-HPAbL-MNkA9US2oU7oauE4enEdmNn01qWXxbNhIiivei31VQ==&ch=vWDQ9b3Gd_si4AYiKyMvjsot6Cp6-Ms4185bu8gPt5xs8HOsunLQbw==)

| Kat watched as 200 immigrants crossed the border, some as young as only a few months old. These are people who want to be apprehended, who want to be processed and released into America. The unofficial numbers for June show 174,512 apprehensions and 39,243 known got-aways.
Worse yet, the surge of immigrants provides cover to the criminals and terrorists seeking entry into America. Some of these people crossing the border are smuggling drugs, fueling the opioid crisis. It's time for the Biden Administration to stop playing political games and put the interests of the American people first. We need to secure our border and clean up the mess Biden and Harris have created. Can Kat count on your support to contribute today to secure our border?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32762031/296784907/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzA5MTAxZC01NWVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RmYA7QOdc6wELWx3-X1MmYkLQjSM8BTwo1S65TQiD-c=) Friend -- This is a longer email that explains why your early grassroots support will have a bigger impact in our race to win this congressional seat in Texas. Please take a moment to read, then consider chipping in.

**2021 is a redistricting year, and due to demographic growth, Texas is set to add two new congressional seats.**

We may not know the exact distinct numbers and boundaries, but based on our research -- we expect a strong Democratic-leaning district here in Austin where I'm running. We also expect the Texas GOP to use their trifecta to gerrymander the state to the fullest extent possible in order to protect incumbent GOP seats for the next decade.

The 2022 election cycle with the Texas Governor’s race at the top of the ticket will set the course for an entire decade — a monumental year for the future of Texans.

This race is more than just about winning a congressional seat. If we can boost turnout in Travis County -- just like we did in Williamson County during my 2020 race -- we will have a _significant_ impact on other statewide races. See for yourself:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32762032/296784908/77586780?refcode=em-07212021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzA5MTAxZC01NWVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RmYA7QOdc6wELWx3-X1MmYkLQjSM8BTwo1S65TQiD-c=)
We need to be ready to get our message out to as many undecided voters as possible as soon as we know what the exact boundaries of our district are. And until then, we need to raise grassroots resources now so we can move swiftly and plan our grassroots field campaign.

Campaigns rely on early fundraising numbers to garner support from grassroots organizations and volunteers -- not to mention press. The faster we raise funds, the stronger the signal we send about how serious this campaign is.

**That's why we're encouraging you to make a contribution now, instead of waiting until we find out what the district boundaries are.** It all adds up. Every single dollar counts, and the earlier you give, the greater your impact.

Thanks for reading, friend. As always, if you have any questions about this email, please feel free to respond directly.

_\- Donna_

Today marks 200 days since the start of the 117th Congress and Kim has already helped deliver real results for families across Washington's 8th District. Here are just a few of the highlights of Kim's work: [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32762383/296786867/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjQzMmVkZC01NWVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Bn-2GD6rSsBGLjrsN6Tukn5HwQwcqZj9zmAoCo_yW0=&emci=e7a1120b-8fe9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4f432edd-55ea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

Today marks 200 days since the start of the 117th Congress, and Kim has already helped deliver real results for families across Washington's 8th District.

Here are just a few of the highlights of Kim's work:

✅ Helped pass COVID-19 relief to families and small businesses, including the extended Child Tax Credit
✅ Secured millions in infrastructure grants for projects across the district, including the Wenatchee Apple Capital Loop Project
✅ Introduced a bill to help make our communities more resilient to wildfires
✅ Had elements of her bill to improve broadband infrastructure implemented by the Department of Commerce
✅ And so much more!

Kim and the Democratic House majority have made so much progress this year, and they're just getting started. But national Republicans have their eyes set on taking back the majority in 2022, and they're looking at flipping Kim's seat to help them do it. If they get their way, they'll roll back all the progress Kim and her colleagues have been working toward.

We can't let Republicans drag us backward. That's why we need to get to work today to ensure we protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority.

body:
I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare. A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc75b2b8edbe454b9a5a719a0d155599&_e=9aPVFw8b1kkPp3RyRijmjUU-VqR8Wu5cljCSG6nWTuXzyhdSYI5Tg264YPR6EqnOafP7_TcCxGfNiqw2pyONRjFxARgmk3f7OZMvGtlCB_I3wFBppxmwvSQPZVZZe-MVRHSPHwYGKr8Xrv-AwIO4tyFf4HpfQYrRK1SyE02ezHL9c5-_jsxSsgcDk0xyQvSK38RnT5HRTQOq2BNfxF8drGYrF9qLeJsxZh4A2rW-7jV3VCkrTBsLmnon_Dd6UVTOhLYJTIxoHoE63bO-ct5nlIY0xx-11Vk_bmwTewFm2efP1kTsMI0e35_nWpZFL29xDDUqmgAjBuipnvVRPWS4bF158moKbqMi2ESqfvquc70r4mmrRiovgt3BgrcT-uw_mawosnIA1GG0-pQmVSFeoGBYKRfOr9zOvVr1qVWfEoFpP88RKIl-FsU3QadKM_b95Wue9YWAEdxkyrQpsWf20g%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

name: Giffords.org
subject: The ATF needs to hear from YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends —
In just a few weeks, the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) will close its official public comment period on the issue of ghost guns.
That means this is one of your last chances to make your voice heard on this critical public safety issue. It only takes a few minutes to make a big difference. Here’s how:
**Step 1:** Use this link: [**https://www.federalregister.gov/documents/2021/05/21/2021-10058/definition-of-frame-or-receiver-and-identification-of-firearms**](https://go.giffords.org/go/2272?t=1&akid=368%2E3935704%2Ea9Tc9N)
**Step 2:** Submit a comment of your own or use the sample comment we’ve included below.
**Step 3:** Feel good that you have done something important and meaningful in the fight to save lives from gun violence.
**\- - - COPY AND PASTE THIS SAMPLE LETTER - - -**
_I support the rule on so-called “ghost guns” that has been proposed by the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF), and I urge ATF to finalize the rule as proposed and treat ghost guns the same as other guns._
_Ghost guns are do-it-yourself firearms that can be acquired without a background check and lack serial numbers, so they cannot be traced by law enforcement. By selling the key components of firearms as intentionally unfinished rather than fully assembled firearms, ghost gun companies manage to skirt federal gun laws. Buyers who aren’t required to pass background checks can quickly and easily convert these unfinished parts into fully functional firearms using common household tools._
_As a result, nothing is stopping a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm from making a ghost gun. Ghost guns are frequently moved by traffickers because they are easier to obtain and harder to track than traditional firearms, leading to more and more ghost guns being traded in the black market and used in criminal activity. Ghost guns have been used to shoot police officers, commit mass shootings, and murder children, and extremist groups are increasingly arming themselves with these dangerous weapons._
_ATF’s proposed rule would change the definition of “firearm” to include components that are intentionally left unfinished. As a result, these parts could only be sold after a background check, and would have to be serialized. This would help stop the flow of these dangerous, untraceable weapons to people legally prohibited from possessing guns._
_This is a commonsense solution to a critically important problem. I wholly support this rule and urge its immediate adoption._
**\- - - END SAMPLE LETTER - - -**
**Once again, the link to submit the comment is here:** [**https://www.federalregister.gov/documents/2021/05/21/2021-10058/definition-of-frame-or-receiver-and-identification-of-firearms**](https://go.giffords.org/go/2272?t=2&akid=368%2E3935704%2Ea9Tc9N)
We can’t stress how important this is. You have a chance to be a part of meaningful change. All you have to do is make your voice heard.
Team Giffords
**[ADD YOUR COMMENT](https://go.giffords.org/go/2272?t=3&akid=368%2E3935704%2Ea9Tc9N)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=368%2E3935704%2Ea9Tc9N) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: Friends — In just a few weeks, the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) will close its official public comment period on the issue of ghost guns. That means this is one of your last chances to make your voice heard on this critical public safety issue. It only takes a few minutes to make a big difference. Here’s how: Step 1: Use this link: Step 2: Submit a comment of your own or use the sample comment we’ve included below. Step 3: Feel good that you have done something important and meaningful in the fight to save lives from gun violence. \- - - COPY AND PASTE THIS SAMPLE LETTER - - - I support the rule on so-called “ghost guns” that has been proposed by the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF), and I urge ATF to finalize the rule as proposed and treat ghost guns the same as other guns. Ghost guns are do-it-yourself firearms that can be acquired without a background check and lack serial numbers, so they cannot be traced by law enforcement. By selling the key components of firearms as intentionally unfinished rather than fully assembled firearms, ghost gun companies manage to skirt federal gun laws. Buyers who aren’t required to pass background checks can quickly and easily convert these unfinished parts into fully functional firearms using common household tools. As a result, nothing is stopping a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm from making a ghost gun. Ghost guns are frequently moved by traffickers because they are easier to obtain and harder to track than traditional firearms, leading to more and more ghost guns being traded in the black market and used in criminal activity. Ghost guns have been used to shoot police officers, commit mass shootings, and murder children, and extremist groups are increasingly arming themselves with these dangerous weapons. ATF’s proposed rule would change the definition of “firearm” to include components that are intentionally left unfinished. As a result, these parts could only be sold after a background check, and would have to be serialized. This would help stop the flow of these dangerous, untraceable weapons to people legally prohibited from possessing guns. This is a commonsense solution to a critically important problem. body:
I was a Capitol Hill police officer for five years.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ykEjBNmlmg2dBgeTQHv0aA/FwVtuPeNp3dr892GAMJNC8kA) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Palombi for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ykEjBNmlmg2dBgeTQHv0aA/FwVtuPeNp3dr892GAMJNC8kA)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ykEjBNmlmg2dBgeTQHv0aA/FwVtuPeNp3dr892GAMJNC8kA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ykEjBNmlmg2dBgeTQHv0aA/FwVtuPeNp3dr892GAMJNC8kA) I was a Capitol Hill police officer for five years.

**And before I tell you what I saw one crucial day in the U.S. House,[I ask you to give a critically important $25, $50, $100, or more right now for my urgently needed race against rabid liberal Nancy Pelosi’s right-hand man, Steny Hoyer.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ykEjBNmlmg2dBgeTQHv0aA/FwVtuPeNp3dr892GAMJNC8kA)**

Now during my first month as a rookie officer on Capitol Hill, my training officer and I walked over to the House side.

The I-35W Mississippi River Bridge in Minnesota had collapsed, killing 13 people and injuring over 140 people.

So, Congress was debating about funding to help rebuild.

And they're about to vote...but the electronic voting system crashes.

A Republican asks that votes get recorded by roll call or by teller.

Then my opponent, career politician Steny Hoyer, stands up on behalf of Democrats, and says “We need to take the system down for a period of time in order to fix it... [the technician] needs approximately 30 minutes with no votes.” But when I came back later in the hour, both sides were still squabbling.

**Twenty term Congressman Steny Hoyer blocked a simple solution to a severe problem, even though our fellow Americans lay dead and broken!**

The pettiness and pride I saw in that moment helped inspire me to want to be the change. You see, Steny Hoyer has been in Congress longer than I’ve been alive.

He’s Nancy Pelosi’s number two guy, with a leftist voting record so horrible that American Conservative Union gave him a lifetime rating of 6.25...out of a possible 100!

What’s more, the Democrats are terrified they’re going to lose control of the House in the mid-term elections. Especially because of Nancy Pelosi’s extreme Defund the Police agenda. You and I can beat Steny Hoyer and send him home to work on his golf swing!

[**Patriot, please support my vital grassroots voter outreach and more with your most generous gift of $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can afford immediately.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ykEjBNmlmg2dBgeTQHv0aA/FwVtuPeNp3dr892GAMJNC8kA)

Your crucial gift of at least $25 or more is absolutely vital to fully fund my voter outreach and get out the vote programs through Election Day.

I can’t get to Capitol Hill without you.

Every dollar and every second counts.

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Chris Palombi

Republican Candidate for Congress, Maryland District 5
Capitol Hill Police veteran, 2007-2012

clean_body: I was a Capitol Hill police officer for five years. | | | | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Palombi for Congress. We encourage you to. | Patriot, I was a Capitol Hill police officer for five years. And before I tell you what I saw one crucial day in the U.S. House, Now during my first month as a rookie officer on Capitol Hill, my training officer and I walked over to the House side. The I-35W Mississippi River Bridge in Minnesota had collapsed, killing 13 people and injuring over 140 people. So, Congress was debating about funding to help rebuild. And they're about to vote...but the electronic voting system crashes. A Republican asks that votes get recorded by roll call or by teller. Then my opponent, career politician Steny Hoyer, stands up on behalf of Democrats, and says “We need to take the system down for a period of time in order to fix it... [the technician] needs approximately 30 minutes with no votes.” But when I came back later in the hour, both sides were still squabbling. Twenty term Congressman Steny Hoyer blocked a simple solution to a severe problem, even though our fellow Americans lay dead and broken! The pettiness and pride I saw in that moment helped inspire me to want to be the change. You see, Steny Hoyer has been in Congress longer than I’ve been alive. He’s Nancy Pelosi’s number two guy, with a leftist voting record so horrible that American Conservative Union gave him a lifetime rating of 6.25...out of a possible 100! What’s more, the Democrats are terrified they’re going to lose control of the House in the mid-term elections. Especially because of Nancy Pelosi’s extreme Defund the Police agenda. You and I can beat Steny Hoyer and send him home to work on his golf swing! Your crucial gift of at least $25 or more is absolutely vital to fully fund my voter outreach and get out the vote programs through Election Day. I can’t get to Capitol Hill without you. Every dollar and every second counts. Thank you so much! Sincerely, Chris Palombi Republican Candidate for Congress, Maryland District 5 Capitol Hill Police veteran, 2007-2012 Paid for by Palombi for Congress Contributions to Palombi for Congress are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited. (C) 2021 Illoominate Media 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465 LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

The first few months of this campaign have been incredible! I couldn’t have possibly done any of this without your support. That is why YOU are one of the very first to check out all our great merch! The momentum is truly on our side and Lisa Murkowski and the DC Insiders are on alert. They will do anything to stay in power. Little do they know, our campaign is backed by Grassroots Conservative supporters like YOU and I know we will WIN! For Alaska, Kelly | | | | ==

name: Jim Jordan
subject: SURVEY: Defund critical race theory?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. Agree or disagree? _We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW5n2oMdNF)****_ | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58473564:W5n2oMdNF:m:1:2247059263:C9AD2F6956232574F657B315EFB1EC85:r)
---

Peter,

Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. **[Agree or disagree?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58473564:W5n2oMdNF:m:1:2247059263:C9AD2F6956232574F657B315EFB1EC85:r)**

There is no sugarcoating the fact that our country's past is full of events that have left painful scars, but we've learned from the mistakes of our ancestors, and we continue to work to improve on our imperfect union. But if you talk to a liberal, chances are they're going to tell you that America is an inherently racist country. And that the Constitution itself is racist.

**How absurd**.

{{#if [FirstName]}}{{[FirstName]}}{{else}}Fellow American{{/if}}, it's critically important that my team, as well as the entire Republican Party knows where you stand on this issue, **particularly in light of the fact that the nation's largest teacher's union just endorsed teaching critical race theory to our middle and high school students**.

Please take a moment to let us know:

| _**

[DO YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN PUBLIC SCHOOLS?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58473564:W5n2oMdNF:m:1:2247059263:C9AD2F6956232574F657B315EFB1EC85:r)** _

POLL REQUEST FOR: {{email}}

Response Deadline: Monday, July 12th

[** TAKE OUR POLL BEFORE MIDNIGHT->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58473564:W5n2oMdNF:m:1:2247059263:C9AD2F6956232574F657B315EFB1EC85:r)

---

Why would we ever teach our children that Americans are created unequal?

The motto which has guided our nation through the last 245 years, do you know it? It's "_e pluribus unum_ " - out of many, one.

This is what the Left does, Peter, they take obscure political theories from ivy league universities and try to make them mainstream to further divide America.

**[Please let us know where you stand on this. It's so important that we stop the Democrats before they start indoctrinating our children with obscure ideas from the fringe Left](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58473564:W5n2oMdNF:m:1:2247059263:C9AD2F6956232574F657B315EFB1EC85:r)**.

Thank you,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58473564:W5n2oMdNF:m:1:2247059263:C9AD2F6956232574F657B315EFB1EC85:r)
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 25, 2020.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW5n2oMdNF). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW5n2oMdNF)

We have two big announcements today!

| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=store_and_signs&n=1)

Peter, Let me first start by saying thank you! Thank you for being a wonderful supporter and a donor to my campaign. We couldn't have gotten this far without you! Today I have two large announcements! The first announcement is that we have officially ordered our first set of Yard Signs. These are going for $35 each (The cost of shipping is included, but additional donations are always greatly appreciated) [](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs8XtvuV5eS7Kn2PCrnM28GbMgjdEJVBCzPsZfehnNd6BgrSV1Vz3rANUr7jrR_AmE&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=store_and_signs&n=2) You can order your Yard Sign right by **[Clicking Here](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs8XtvuV5eS7Kn2PCrnM28GbMgjdEJVBCzPsZfehnNd6BgrSV1Vz3rANUr7jrR_AmE&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=store_and_signs&n=3).** The second announcement we have is that our campaign store has officially launched. body:
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=df5a1593370f4017941269da3a954a22&_e=kOGvC3U5luR5Ep_pu8-P5Z6cES6GO43wqNrkxPTYiv4QJ4WZIO3VRTt2_NyI_5u9rshZzoa4mh8n7XBCWiK3a-ZRRtmqna7_w6-RDcTSm2Szn_CNV6W548WrydwDkhCDcGWf03ZVqxgkn64zd_FjIxGElQDHYZrf6h_uUnL82n-D-EEFw2vi4_cwWr0RqbXHvZspJiF1VNyCwrdDG3rermF1gcfjLdSXohVLzOH1De-mfNMW4xRWildbDoSImNIcye0B0-bLo1wlSBh8-_U0SoswGYlx0qcyxQG-2LNrt8AAP2W2axEt_TjMN21oR5u9nn0us3wdt8Kh6puKOx8egemsVuvWF71A5PdRhKjqpVQmraLxrEDivE6OKUeaPfJn)

Dear Friend,

I’m often asked what other conservative warriors there are in Congress. Please allow me to introduce you to one such person: Warren Davidson (R-OH).

Warren is a West Point graduate and former Army Ranger who built manufacturing companies from the ground up. In 2015, with my support he ran as an outsider for Congress, winning the seat formerly held by John Boehner. What a difference he has made!

From day one in Congress, he has been a bold champion for conservative values: standing with President Trump and me for secure borders, free enterprise, and a strong America.

Here’s the thing – Warren’s campaign funds have been depleted over the past year and I offered to help his campaign accounts back up to a satisfactory level. [**As a personal favor to me, would you please chip-in $5, $10, or even $25 today to support one of the hardest-working members in the Republican Party?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=df5a1593370f4017941269da3a954a22&_e=kOGvC3U5luR5Ep_pu8-P5Z6cES6GO43wqNrkxPTYiv4QJ4WZIO3VRTt2_NyI_5u9rshZzoa4mh8n7XBCWiK3a-ZRRtmqna7_w6-RDcTSm2Szn_CNV6W548WrydwDkhCDcGWf03ZVqxgkn64zd_FjIxGElQDHYZrf6h_uUnL82n-rNcCKg-JJrE6h4Z5ZOKHsJiGByJ6ovpgPNvGRS65LRGISuP-drmh-LUUqXREjMUssTSzr6xnmF4zEVty8aFCdlz_097ZHM04DYkdHSefkTPSmq5CyRfl6oHDirsswQ34FurB7pTABu-YAdotmLm5HF82pNZgUMxgLwHM8jzl2coj_Lldj_ReJ12w1MqJMg7-AwKXaRgTL5RlH7zFpANtR)

[**Support Warren Davidson for Congress**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=df5a1593370f4017941269da3a954a22&_e=kOGvC3U5luR5Ep_pu8-P5Z6cES6GO43wqNrkxPTYiv4QJ4WZIO3VRTt2_NyI_5u9rshZzoa4mh8n7XBCWiK3a-ZRRtmqna7_w6-RDcTSm2Szn_CNV6W548WrydwDkhCDcGWf03ZVqxgkn64zd_FjIxGElQDHYZrf6h_uUnL82n9NBOibtF2hS92dxd4oEC809t6sQxQryDI6gq5YiXr1aV3JYkEusQIj9TiWZwJVJQzLFOOLxUiTlNllHmd07lAR0W6fi77SqxUCgCtnHJDu8h3VNWorwD11jnKTbVp9M8eK7poK1_ToSrI89GvjoWuepPrvC6dshU6z-D9hZjJ_ekSnnqty7vLTizAAnVH-zDy0BNch2qP_z2oDHhKAzQ3-)

Warren is fighting day after day at my side for important issues like:
* Ensuring the integrity of our elections
* Defending our Constitutional freedoms of speech, religion, and the Second Amendment
* Securing the border, and
* Stopping the out-of-control liberal agenda from Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden

Warren is not in Congress to be part of the “in-crowd”. He doesn’t go along to get along with the DC Swamp. **He’s a soldier, a businessman, and a family man who believes to his core in President Reagan’s idea of “American exceptionalism”.** Serving in Germany when the Berlin Wall fell and seeing first-hand the devastating effects of communism...Warren is as rock-solid as they come.

I need Warren Davidson standing next to me in the fight, so I’m asking for your help. You’ve been such a wonderful supporter of mine, and I greatly appreciate it! [**I hope you can find a way to support Warren as well by chipping in $5, $10 or more to Warren’s campaign. It will be a great investment in helping re-elect a conservative warrior!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=df5a1593370f4017941269da3a954a22&_e=kOGvC3U5luR5Ep_pu8-P5Z6cES6GO43wqNrkxPTYiv4QJ4WZIO3VRTt2_NyI_5u9rshZzoa4mh8n7XBCWiK3a-ZRRtmqna7_w6-RDcTSm2Szn_CNV6W548WrydwDkhCDcGWf03ZVqxgkn64zd_FjIxGElQDHYZrf6h_uUnL82n8Xf-Ql33kqFGf-o8f-1HopfgMgbJufXwQhed6OFEF3gsGQVXADJczuMO4W_VdC5Qrx5hi6BR8-mDDsTuYRbfC4uHZ3F7H-JFBVBcqgY4y3AWMAioGRF2DNOoxXzygCjGjBHBm4vbmHvbLh9soaZoGuc5RREImXH1g8Ub-NKA6J_-fvkJgp4ycsR-8y-IH7AUTqOQJQKsFwDaYMTAWbAxOC)

In Liberty,
Jim

Peter,

Did you read this breaking news article that detailed Mike Garcia's latest scandal?
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32765951/296802068/453008394?refcode=em21_210721_midmonth2-s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmUwMDU1Ny02MGVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nav4K7hlrrKPcm1eNygvWfCjAIo1EVDe4MAjegf90Zc=)
---

During the 2020 election cycle, Mike Garcia failed to properly disclose his stock trades and finances. Yes, you read that right. **He deliberately deceived the residents of this district when he did not disclose the specific stocks that he owned or sold since his election to Congress.**

That is a clear violation of the _2012 Stop Trading on Congressional Knowledge (STOCK) Act_ which requires members of Congress to disclose their stock transactions within 45 days of their sale or purchase.

But wait, there's more to the story, _and it only gets worse_. Not only did Mike fail to reveal his stock trades in time, but he strategically waited until after the election was over and _finally_ disclosed them on November 23 -- almost three weeks after the 2020 election.

**Turns out, along with his re-election campaign last summer, Mike was busy buying up stock in companies that allowed him to make hundreds of thousands of dollars in gains. And he didn't want voters to know about it.**

Peter, I'll be honest with you, I am not surprised. Mike's only goal in Congress has been to satisfy Republicans and make sure Trump's happy with him at the end of the day. He's lost sight of even his own campaign promise of draining out the swamp. _Instead, he has become the swamp._

**[Mike's latest scandal hurts because not only did he violate ethics law, he lied to you, Peter. If you're sick and tired of elected officials like Mike Garcia abusing the trust of their constituents only to personally enrich themselves, it's time to elect a leader who knows better.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32765953/296802069/453008394?refcode=em21_210721_midmonth2-s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmUwMDU1Ny02MGVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nav4K7hlrrKPcm1eNygvWfCjAIo1EVDe4MAjegf90Zc=)**

\--Christy Smith
