subject: Woke Crime Wave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
This is what happens when the Woke Left takes over. | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/woke-crime-wave?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Peter: This is what happens when the Woke Left takes over.

You’ve seen the runaway inflation. The hateful bigotry of the 1619 Project and Critical Race Theory. The crisis along our Southern border.

But nowhere has Leftist failure hurt more people than on the streets of America’s cities. The news media is trying to cover it up, but a tidal wave of violent crime has crashed over our country this year.

[**Help House Conservatives end the Left’s soft-on-crime disaster!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=d1aa0f8d33&e=b2c16e6198)

In cities around the country, liberal mayors and politicians are trying to defund their police departments. They are not prosecuting shoplifting. They are badmouthing police officers and intimidating them into retiring from the force.

The results are shocking. ▶︎ In Chicago, murders are up 33% over last year.
▶︎ In New York, shootings are up 50%.
▶︎ In Los Angeles, homicides are up 36%.

The trends are similar in Seattle, San Francisco, Portland, Philadelphia, Pittsburgh, Detroit – everywhere the Woke Left is in power, criminals are really in charge.

Serious crimes are up in 63 of the nation’s 66 largest police jurisdictions. And that doesn’t even count the rampant violence where President Donald Trump’s Border Wall should be.

You won’t hear about this from Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, or other Washington Democrats. They are trying to hide the facts. They try to blame President Trump – many months after he left office. They try to blame guns, conservatives, Christians... anyone but the real culprits – in their mirrors.

**The only way to stop this madness is for conservatives to retake Congress in 2022.**

[**You can help by supporting the House Freedom Fund!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=f5bb31905c&e=b2c16e6198)

The House Freedom Fund is the only organization in America exclusively committed to electing true, fighting conservatives to the U.S. House of Representatives. No RINOs. No Never-Trumpers. No elitists. No police de-funders. No Critical Race Theory bigots.

_**HFF only supports principled conservatives ready to fight for our country, our values, our Constitution, and our communities.**_

Fighting crime isn’t a mystery. We know how to clean up America’s streets. Support cops and prosecutors. Target drugs. Punish even petty crimes – because they are usually committed by people with long rap sheets. Make arrests, and for perps who can’t straighten up, lock them up and throw away the key. [**Click here to get tough on crime!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=713f83372d&e=b2c16e6198)

Big-city Democrats just don’t want to. They would rather feel “woke” than keep their constituents safe.

**This crime wave is still rising – and it may be THE issue of the 2022 midterm elections. **

As next year’s House races take shape, the House Freedom Fund will be putting candidates through a stringent vetting process. HFF will only support the best of the best – because contributors, like you, have no time for establishment politicians who care more about their reputations than your safety.

Only a conservative House can check the Democrats’ appeasement of criminals. And only conservative candidates with the courage to take on the woke left and the media can win the toughest races.

[**Please join me in supporting House Freedom Fund today!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=1f700ba211&e=b2c16e6198)

Thank you for considering this request and thank you for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely,
---
|
---
| JIM JORDAN
U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio

Hi there, Our campaign has been underway for a little over a month, and Ras has been traveling across the state to meet Iowans where they are. He’s experienced great work being done in communities small and large, and he’s listened to Iowans discuss what they believe Governor Reynolds should be prioritizing. So far, many folks say they want to see our state government defend our right to vote, protect our environment and take action on climate change, increase funding for our kids’ schools and teachers, and make healthcare more affordable. What could they do without? For starters, Governor Kim Reynolds making Iowans foot the bill for her political stunt, using taxpayer dollars to send state troopers to the U.S. border with Mexico instead of investing in infrastructure and services here at home. [**As the end of July nears, Ras wants to check in with you virtually and hear what you think Iowa’s state leadership should (and shouldn’t) be prioritizing. Will you take our July survey to share your thoughts with Ras today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32766341/296803201/-1772283432?refcode=fl_email_su_20210721survey_rfi_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2RjMWM0OS02MmVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KvBlvU-mY5qtz67bcf8NcwZMGcG238gdHIxdGy0aS9Q=&emci=e2dc1c49-62ea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e7dc1c49-62ea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445) **** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32766342/296803202/-1772283432?refcode=fl_email_su_20210721survey_rfi_full_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2RjMWM0OS02MmVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KvBlvU-mY5qtz67bcf8NcwZMGcG238gdHIxdGy0aS9Q=&emci=e2dc1c49-62ea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e7dc1c49-62ea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)

That’s why I’m coming to you personally.

| _I’ll keep this quick, Peter._ When I asked you to step up and defend North Carolina in the 2020 Election, you answered the call.
* We **DELIVERED** North Carolina’s Electoral College votes to President Donald J. Trump.
* We **RE-ELECTED** Republican Senator Thom Tillis in a must-win battleground race.
* We were **VICTORIOUS** in key races up and down the ballot and kept North Carolina “red.”

_Now, we’re facing our biggest test yet. I need your help once again._ **[I’m personally asking you to contribute $35, or whatever you can afford, to help me Keep North Carolina “red” in 2022. clean_body: That’s why I’m coming to you personally. | I’ll keep this quick, Peter. When I asked you to step up and defend North Carolina in the 2020 Election, you answered the call. We DELIVERED North Carolina’s Electoral College votes to President Donald J. Trump. We RE-ELECTED Republican Senator Thom Tillis in a must-win battleground race. We were VICTORIOUS in key races up and down the ballot and kept North Carolina “red.” Now, we’re facing our biggest test yet. I need your help once again. | | There’s a lot at stake in these midterm elections, Peter. Republicans are just FIVE SEATS away from reclaiming the House Majority. And here in North Carolina, we’ll be defending an OPEN SENATE SEAT \-- making us one of the Left’s top targets for the second election in a row. | Thank you. Michael Whatley** Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

Friend,

Tom didn’t set out to run for Congress. He isn’t a career politician but Tom stepped up when his community needed him, and became involved in local issues affecting Arizona.

Now, Tom is serving Arizonans in Congress and is leading the charge to implement solutions to problems we face. [**Now, can you chip in to help keep Tom in Congress? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32766735/296804602/-1572630612?refcode=em_fr_2021.07.21_b1_ohhq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGUzMDc2YS02M2VhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n2m2M3qVFVKLRCwfeeto-viug9awl0eDHkc-MwYRG3k=)

Public service has always been a way of life for Tom, and he’s not stopping now. Tom has been advocating for better protection of our natural resources, and helping to make sure that rural Americans get access to the resources they deserve.

He needs our help to continue leading for Arizonans in Congress. That’s why we’re emailing you today. [**Friend, will you chip in to help keep Tom’s leadership in Congress? Your donation will go straight to our campaign efforts to re-elect Tom.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32766736/296804603/-1572630612?refcode=em_fr_2021.07.21_b1_ohhq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGUzMDc2YS02M2VhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n2m2M3qVFVKLRCwfeeto-viug9awl0eDHkc-MwYRG3k=)

Peter,

The right to vote is the cornerstone of our democracy — but for far too many Americans, this right is threatened by Republican legislators every single day.

That’s why it’s imperative that Congress pass voting protection legislation immediately, and why I’m hoping you’ll [_**sign my petition now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32767053/296805424/-1314087203?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmNkMmZmNC02NGVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tq0drTc2QwsED4-SXLEtNoaAXt5OSXaN5v2KxjQghuM=&emci=70cfbb0e-3aea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8fcd2ff4-64ea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5543981)

Congress is considering legislation that would restore a key provision of the Voting Rights Act struck down by the Supreme Court in 2013 and require jurisdictions with a history of racial discrimination to gain federal approval before making changes to voting laws.

**Passing voter protection legislation like this one is our best method of protecting the right of every American to vote.**[_**Will you add your name now to show other members of Congress that there is massive grassroots support for this legislation?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32767055/296805425/-1314087203?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmNkMmZmNC02NGVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tq0drTc2QwsED4-SXLEtNoaAXt5OSXaN5v2KxjQghuM=&emci=70cfbb0e-3aea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8fcd2ff4-64ea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5543981)

Peter,

The news coming out of Georgia is beyond incredible.

According to the just-released report:
* **In Fulton County, the hand recount was wrong by 60%**
* **100,000 tally sheets for ballots were missing**
* **They duplicated thousands of extra votes for Joe Biden**
* **They fabricated vote counts of 100 -0 for Biden, many times!**

I warned you this would happen, Peter. What else will they find once the full Forensic Audit takes place?

This is going to get nasty, and I'm going to need the support of my STRONGEST defenders during this critical time. I'm calling on YOU to step up and STAND WITH ME.

subject: Someone ate a bat...

body:
Or was it a lab leak? How do you think the COVID-19 started? Or was it a lab leak? | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1cd2513e0f9d4cbb9137b64894022588&_e=CLFA9ie3PEp9DKyWCHi8pzehvH89-HfEV7GKn78sxgze4olWRTPNsMJmy81kWbENVvLANv5htlLUyBnXD-8sfJaF6uX6HgSWV9pxnVAuqy34jT2fcu77TYETU-sWtwwd7EAwZ-D8QxNPvAUnTRumhCR0MyDqzJizKSjsRWfTEl1okxF7olo0G842WXyK35HvYbddqxkqV8XAMvISx_BCynNvxn-wyQf-KrKmEZb9nQqEZO3TffZPnXIuXIKLLNbazij4D1gpuAr7Xp8wKq7it3NtCInQffWwM2GjhrcpYEC__o5mRShYwXB3ci639v4rz3rioMrokWHicFpqnjDH84EXbKkxGi9yXIr9icXCAPTVYdViqtIxjNVMvczLxbLBXNNQUFszKsDXIu_ukdLgcGoJm2iTQRYTEZhTfcjkCaLtFQJO1nIcDhAh6Tco1PbRp2tvv_9PIl3Zi2pgnjuAePby46KczsYhGrm8tMm_Y1eHCmD7xtT2X6WT8_4HhOJ9oCyRGrJp7yK23aQdU5TQyjMlblFEiD3u4zbhTep2-Y8%3D)

---
Fellow American,

The World Health Organization chief dropped a major bombshell last week when he said it was premature to rule out a potential link between the COVID-19 pandemic and a laboratory leak.

**_Yes, you read that right._**

After a year of people being censored and blocked all over social media for saying the pandemic was a result of a lab leak and after Trump was raked over the coals by the Democrats for terminating the United States relationship with the WHO, the constantly changing narrative has changed again.

[**So, I am curious as to what you think, Fellow American?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1cd2513e0f9d4cbb9137b64894022588&_e=CLFA9ie3PEp9DKyWCHi8pzehvH89-HfEV7GKn78sxgze4olWRTPNsMJmy81kWbENVvLANv5htlLUyBnXD-8sfJaF6uX6HgSWV9pxnVAuqy34jT2fcu77TYETU-sWtwwd7EAwZ-D8QxNPvAUnTRumhCR0MyDqzJizKSjsRWfTEl1okxF7olo0G842WXyK35HvYbddqxkqV8XAMvISx_BCynNvxn-wyQf-KrKmEZb9nQqEZO3TffZPnXIuXIKLLNbazij4D1gpuAr7Xp8wKq7it3NtCInQffWwM2GjhrcpYEC__o5mRShYwXB3ci639v4rz3rioMrokWHicFpqnjDH8zzpUkaOCG1SRMz5tiPETEojEwfbIRBz_FJuclpVTJBrQGh39iE8bPlgp7s79w16G0Ot902qyvhYc2cwv4yg0w3RPEEgAZ_Czxxxcf3POyz_VZFUXlj_QZxtsSWRi_Oda29k_0lsgPObxKHKaleBWAEQEdjVqlLPeH9XFxZ3T6p6rd6ctT9Lgh7DsJCnccM2v2TBxFwZP-v_eLLsDotTGGg%3D) Are you a skeptic of the origins of the COVID-19 pandemic or do you believe what the Chinese government claims happened... (that someone ate a bat)?

[**I’m a skeptic - seems like a lab leak ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1cd2513e0f9d4cbb9137b64894022588&_e=CLFA9ie3PEp9DKyWCHi8pzehvH89-HfEV7GKn78sxgze4olWRTPNsMJmy81kWbENVvLANv5htlLUyBnXD-8sfJaF6uX6HgSWV9pxnVAuqy34jT2fcu77TYETU-sWtwwd7EAwZ-D8QxNPvAUnTRumhCR0MyDqzJizKSjsRWfTEl1okxF7olo0G842WXyK35HvYbddqxkqV8XAMvISx_BCynNvxn-wyQf-KrKmEZb9nQqEZO3TffZPnXIuXIKLLNbazij4D1gpuAr7Xp8wKq7it3NtCInQffWwM2GjhrcpYEC__o5mRShYwXB3ci639v4rz3rioMrokWHicFpqnjDH812RIxlYnZtxiH6FUqqpVQxHBIk-WIiYbblg8PAZ41j4h1LzuIvhOk7SYZjuKLI-pAwyaAjQyRIDdT5B3JOPFSujJ2OJmqb3rQjiuHK00m4zoJubgcgq99-tYTosoy4K5NWEM-uopwXerLV9UOhTLMfdJOwBX0-tfmcGRhPWXwwK_fq5KksUOpLwH9JevPCEzBEmwvmDpc-ichEOy216RuE%3D)
[**I trust Biden & the Chinese government ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1cd2513e0f9d4cbb9137b64894022588&_e=CLFA9ie3PEp9DKyWCHi8pzehvH89-HfEV7GKn78sxgze4olWRTPNsMJmy81kWbENVvLANv5htlLUyBnXD-8sfJaF6uX6HgSWV9pxnVAuqy34jT2fcu77TYETU-sWtwwd7EAwZ-D8QxNPvAUnTRumhCR0MyDqzJizKSjsRWfTEl1okxF7olo0G842WXyK35HvYbddqxkqV8XAMvISx_BCynNvxn-wyQf-KrKmEZb9nQqEZO3TffZPnXIuXIKLLNbazij4D1gpuAr7Xp8wKq7it3NtCInQffWwM2GjhrcpYEC__o5mRShYwXB3ci639v4rz3rioMrokWHicFpqnjDH8yR6t-i_yEkWZgrYxMWImLPkc-wTtZfOUKeQ3yOjkCEen5Aa0FZJbbUCEOSLT9ufXc2a7jGqGYItED_nSR34JWZiW7dNn5GptZhxxwJy9qjqU0RQ9xJoPejsB9PnKBonbjrE06CzbPwvuwCV2XEKDy1Jd6BFsCZRKisRzuQOdH-2CtQfsB4pLOL-fCROkXY_cJu9tis4J4OdevOPovFXyVc%3D)
We are over 18 months into the COVID-19 pandemic that has disrupted our world and we are no closer to any real answers. This is absurd.

It’s time the Biden administration finds out the real truth, but it’s clear they don’t want to.

They want to continue to use science when it fits their agenda so the fewer answers we have, the better for them to control us. And they are trying like hell to control us - take Biden’s new plan to go door-to-door to check citizen’s vaccine statuses. Last time I checked, this was still America and we are still free to make our own decisions.

clean_body: Or was it a lab leak? How do you think the COVID-19 started? Or was it a lab leak? | Fellow American, The World Health Organization chief dropped a major bombshell last week when he said it was premature to rule out a potential link between the COVID-19 pandemic and a laboratory leak. Yes, you read that right. After a year of people being censored and blocked all over social media for saying the pandemic was a result of a lab leak and after Trump was raked over the coals by the Democrats for terminating the United States relationship with the WHO, the constantly changing narrative has changed again. Are you a skeptic of the origins of the COVID-19 pandemic or do you believe what the Chinese government claims happened... (that someone ate a bat)? We are over 18 months into the COVID-19 pandemic that has disrupted our world and we are no closer to any real answers. This is absurd. It’s time the Biden administration finds out the real truth, but it’s clear they don’t want to. They want to continue to use science when it fits their agenda so the fewer answers we have, the better for them to control us. And they are trying like hell to control us - take Biden’s new plan to go door-to-door to check citizen’s vaccine statuses. Last time I checked, this was still America and we are still free to make our own decisions. Since the government wants to control how you think, I want to know what you believe before it’s too late. Sincerely, Jose Castillo Republican for Congress | | PAID FOR BY JOSE CASTILLO FOR CONGRESS Jose Castillo for Congress PO Box 2651 Davenport, FL 33836 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Jim Jordan
subject: My friend Warren needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Davidson for Congress
body:
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c0f3c411a8c4eb493b0239485ed7247&_e=ztCpWgwRkqHjBxaGyKOkoyW_VrAy5gA-nXuqH9WhSHz80z9U_Ja1_4ttPES7QG-wEePC10VHxHz4yunBPOhRx0jslyuIUTeN_HtyZbCqGuVBxrXMbzE9ptKWVGd436s2cgQ8LxHJZtku3zUc1A1tEDobkDV0xXT_FSzEBGOtYJWoQlrvk2HOeRMV6gYx4iPQTWUj-IN0QmNPDTgqLQ1sBRL8FA11Sw8NqVZv4NNUDUhxhD5OzvoKC2hGSVvwwOqfNWqS_iqdRuHDK_cg3AE_wedf-7xdFKfxTvnB2mDkGt1QA2FSF2rAMHFmASYXMNGU75iUxMdEm7oj7DVbzbOGjbwX1ZubsXLwTqEm9LSb9qrVhp_7InFZNHaQ-HOyIAQ0)

Dear Friend,

I’m often asked what other conservative warriors there are in Congress. Please allow me to introduce you to one such person: Warren Davidson (R-OH).

Warren is a West Point graduate and former Army Ranger who built manufacturing companies from the ground up. In 2015, with my support he ran as an outsider for Congress, winning the seat formerly held by John Boehner. What a difference he has made!

From day one in Congress, he has been a bold champion for conservative values: standing with President Trump and me for secure borders, free enterprise, and a strong America.

Here’s the thing – Warren’s campaign funds have been depleted over the past year and I offered to help his campaign accounts back up to a satisfactory level. [**As a personal favor to me, would you please chip-in $5, $10, or even $25 today to support one of the hardest-working members in the Republican Party?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c0f3c411a8c4eb493b0239485ed7247&_e=ztCpWgwRkqHjBxaGyKOkoyW_VrAy5gA-nXuqH9WhSHz80z9U_Ja1_4ttPES7QG-wEePC10VHxHz4yunBPOhRx0jslyuIUTeN_HtyZbCqGuVBxrXMbzE9ptKWVGd436s2cgQ8LxHJZtku3zUc1A1tEDobkDV0xXT_FSzEBGOtYJXp_fg0wV-H4vrlWQbNxNodqmggJULeZrWixskibJxIfW2b-2NO6vFQQt_jUkSP1n3QSkY9nHeMclUAyFOeJ-adwCT8_iOYVPOyLmP-KH0hI_sUMY0ca6UNIElt_Yya9eHoFEiPqArvM1uyjmhjZkM7iOz3_g1ZjOPEyAZqzWoU6XkxCroruudAAesF5EbO6VmUNoM6vCLV6n_WC-hrj7hT)

[**Support Warren Davidson for Congress**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c0f3c411a8c4eb493b0239485ed7247&_e=ztCpWgwRkqHjBxaGyKOkoyW_VrAy5gA-nXuqH9WhSHz80z9U_Ja1_4ttPES7QG-wEePC10VHxHz4yunBPOhRx0jslyuIUTeN_HtyZbCqGuVBxrXMbzE9ptKWVGd436s2cgQ8LxHJZtku3zUc1A1tEDobkDV0xXT_FSzEBGOtYJXjkx8rcif7rhPA-4Vp723Nq8F5M3G_FknmfvZcW8ZsW361SHzr4h7X97UgqxK7ale90iYM__BMpESsaZBF-q3hZrghMVeJ_89JqA0eNpCsdPRKnr22TeU_3Ci6b-x1VzsCxU6B8KqGSSBJSapL0DT9Qg2jRnyPT3dnIq94JEL7W-vBv5Ss-LUxkRtQO4J2EArcLroNKQfGWDM_akYJZwMx)

Warren is fighting day after day at my side for important issues like:
* Ensuring the integrity of our elections
* Defending our Constitutional freedoms of speech, religion, and the Second Amendment
* Securing the border, and
* Stopping the out-of-control liberal agenda from Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden

Warren is not in Congress to be part of the “in-crowd”. He doesn’t go along to get along with the DC Swamp. **He’s a soldier, a businessman, and a family man who believes to his core in President Reagan’s idea of “American exceptionalism”.** Serving in Germany when the Berlin Wall fell and seeing first-hand the devastating effects of communism...Warren is as rock-solid as they come.

I need Warren Davidson standing next to me in the fight, so I’m asking for your help. You’ve been such a wonderful supporter of mine, and I greatly appreciate it! [**I hope you can find a way to support Warren as well by chipping in $5, $10 or more to Warren’s campaign. It will be a great investment in helping re-elect a conservative warrior!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c0f3c411a8c4eb493b0239485ed7247&_e=ztCpWgwRkqHjBxaGyKOkoyW_VrAy5gA-nXuqH9WhSHz80z9U_Ja1_4ttPES7QG-wEePC10VHxHz4yunBPOhRx0jslyuIUTeN_HtyZbCqGuVBxrXMbzE9ptKWVGd436s2cgQ8LxHJZtku3zUc1A1tEDobkDV0xXT_FSzEBGOtYJUMI-Z0K_F8IQh7mCTC7wSxpaR4FGnO6XU6gd1yD8sZlbiV7QWR1yYQ3mbfWk-XjWT82MmAbJKFVZti3qDMnQoF1L-T3pd1WF73l0cqfhvoTb_NVgyUK4CwLKZTyaPunWapZwmhgZ0BapHCGhohltNeCbIPDm1GLl-QYsPdZ08DENyY2G02x-2zDZ9Umbp2ZaJOf-NUwmtU0UADx-_9ZtQz)

In Liberty,
Jim

body:
This year’s been tough, Friend. So far in 2021, **police officer deaths in the line of duty have****increased 40%**. We can’t let his announcement derail us from expanding our Democratic majority -- political experts say that Ohio’s open Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: re: Jeff Bezos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Yesterday, Jeff Bezos -- the wealthiest person on the planet -- blasted himself into space. Meanwhile, here on Earth, families are struggling to put food on the table, pay the bills, and keep a roof over their heads.

While billionaires jockey with each other into the stars, urgent issues intensify down here, like the climate crisis, health care costs, and the survival of working families. Over the past year alone, the wealthiest few saw their wealth explode while workers and families lost their jobs, their homes, and their livelihoods. It’s outrageous.

As state treasurer, working on homeownership, retirement, and economic security, I’ve been advocating for the financial health of all people in Wisconsin. And growing up in Eau Claire as the daughter of public school teachers, I worked at Pizza Hut and Baker’s Square to pay for college and learned pretty quickly how to make every dollar count.

**As Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator, I’ll fight for a wholesale rewrite of the tax system, starting with an Elizabeth Warren-style wealth tax.**

I’ll also work to reverse Donald Trump and Ron Johnson’s tax giveaways to the ultra-wealthy, lock in the 2017 middle-class tax cuts, make the child tax credit permanent, expand small business tax relief, support family farms, pass a new tax cut for the 99%, and cement the Earned Income Tax Credit expansion.

This is how we get back to the business of doing right by working families, and this is what I will fight for in the U.S. Senate. I’m asking you to join me.

[**To give working families, the middle class, small businesses, and family farms the help they need, those with more should pay more. Add your name to stand with me in this fight:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32769063/296811997/1802735402?gpsid=31_130_19834&ms=em21_210721_bezos_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx_sl1&refcode=em21_210721_bezos_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx_sl1&utm_campaign=em21_210721_bezos_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx_sl1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGE0OWU3MC02Y2VhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iUjcOW7qpJJY1gqjt1dckBipZ4XAw5POWG5OowJr3iA=&emci=13a49e70-6cea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=14a49e70-6cea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659593)
[I'M IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32769064/296811998/1802735402?gpsid=31_130_19834&ms=em21_210721_bezos_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx_sl1&refcode=em21_210721_bezos_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx_sl1&utm_campaign=em21_210721_bezos_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx_sl1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGE0OWU3MC02Y2VhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iUjcOW7qpJJY1gqjt1dckBipZ4XAw5POWG5OowJr3iA=&emci=13a49e70-6cea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=14a49e70-6cea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659593)
We have a broken, regressive tax system, and as senator I will work to right this wrong. That means defeating extreme politicians like Ron Johnson, who solidify this corrosively unfair status quo.

That’s the difference in this campaign, and why I’m running: Ron Johnson has helped entrench glaring tax inequalities with big cuts for the rich and corporations. As a fifth-generation Wisconsinite, my focus is right here on planet Earth, fighting for Wisconsin workers and families.

My hope is that you will join me. Thank you.

— Sarah

| _If you are a registered lobbyist and have received this email in error, please[ contact us here ](mailto:info@sarahforwisconsin.com). _
---
PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN

Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States

If you would like to receive fewer emails, [update your information here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32769065/296811999/1446289968?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGE0OWU3MC02Y2VhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iUjcOW7qpJJY1gqjt1dckBipZ4XAw5POWG5OowJr3iA=&emci=13a49e70-6cea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=14a49e70-6cea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659593).

We’ve learned a few lessons from our year-round work winning 20 progressive ballot measure campaigns: maybe most importantly that these campaigns are hard, and we have to start early and begin organizing years in advance.
Plus, _our next campaigns could be our toughest fights yet._
To keep our momentum going on issues like Medicaid expansion, it means taking the fight to states that progressives have ignored for years -- states like South Dakota where thousands of people continue to go without life-saving care.
**The best way to help us win these campaigns? Starting a monthly recurring donation!**
**[Please, contribute $15 every month to help us fight back against the special interest attacks and win more campaigns for economic, gender, and racial justice.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32769165/296812293/906598300?refcode=em072121_espy&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2M5MWJhOS02Y2VhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lTLnlvMP2hAAU6YVBaWV_Re2vpOUNPlFdgfooYALerw=)**
It’ll be a HUGE help for us, and we’d be so grateful.
Thanks,
Kelly Hall
Executive Director, The Fairness Project

If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please =. Funds raised will be used to support ballot measures, on-the-ground efforts, and other advocacy activities in support of working families. Contributions or gifts to The Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to The Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at The Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, . 2300 18th St NW #21337 Washington, DC 20009

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

One more thing: Devin Nunes is terrified of losing to us. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: Devin Nunes is vulnerable, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat him.

---

Peter,

Here's a question for you: Why would Nancy Pelosi VETO Jim Jordan from being a part of her prized January 6th committee?

Is it because:
1. She will do anything in her power to stop the voices of conservatives from being heard.

2. She would rather have "followers" on her committee than independent thinkers who are determined to get to the truth, or ..

3. Her January 6th Select Committee isn't about getting to the truth ... it's actually all about politics

The correct answer is D: "ALL OF THE ABOVE."

Here's what Nancy Pelosi neglected to include in her "veto message": Right now in Pelosi's America, **the retirement accounts of hardworking Americans on shaky ground** ... crime is on the rise...illegals are crossing the border...inflation is looming...and **able-bodied Americans choosing unemployment benefits over work**.

Pelosi wants to divert people's attention from the fact that the economy is literally falling apart on her watch, so she's decided to go back to the old playbook: **attacking President Trump**.

[**STAND WITH JIM JORDAN AGAINST NANCY PELOSI ➞**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987386:J6hV5nl0N:m:1:3253819041:251BD0951D9812F6303A7EA4DE823500:r)
For her plan to work, she **MUST** silence conservatives like us. Her committee must be full of people who "go along to get along." They CANNOT challenge the company line.

If Nancy Pelosi knows one thing, **she knows that I 'm a conservative who will never stop fighting for the truth**...that I'm ready to take her and her left-wing allies head on, and I'm ready to weather every attack they throw my way.

**[I can do this because I know you, the American people, stand behind our efforts to get Congress back to work on the real problems facing our nation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987386:J6hV5nl0N:m:1:3253819041:251BD0951D9812F6303A7EA4DE823500:r)**

[**CHIP-IN $10 ➞**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987386:J6hV5nl0N:m:1:3253819041:251BD0951D9812F6303A7EA4DE823500:r)

[**CHIP-IN $22 ➞**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987386:J6hV5nl0N:m:1:3253819041:251BD0951D9812F6303A7EA4DE823500:r)

[**CHIP-IN ANY AMOUNT ➞**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987386:J6hV5nl0N:m:1:3253819041:251BD0951D9812F6303A7EA4DE823500:r)

She might have vetoed me from her committee, **but I 'm not stopping my fight for the truth.**

Sincerely,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987386:J6hV5nl0N:m:1:3253819041:251BD0951D9812F6303A7EA4DE823500:r)

name: Jim Inhofe
subject: They want to indoctrinate our kids
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIM INHOFE
body:
| | We must protect our children! |
#### [View this email online](http://email.senatepatriot.com/q/1m7152O4fAAhvGkcOkmT/wv)
---|---
| | | [ ](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1Z6zoPlkpeiJasU2bdKIiw)
---
| | Friend,
**In 1776, our Founding Fathers' words in the Declaration of Independence changed the world forever. Our American Republic was founded on the principle that “All men are created equal; endowed by their creator with the right to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness.” ** **While we have always needed to work to build a more perfect union, hundreds of thousands of people come to this country every year in search for a better life.** **Today, liberals and the woke mob are on a mission to change the legacy and very foundation of America. They’re using**critical race theory** to indoctrinate our children and teach them this country is inherently bad. Oklahoma led the way in banning CRT, but we need to support other states doing this. ** [**_< <CLICK HERE to tell us what you think of critical race theory>>_**](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1Z6KVaEpJt9VgCG8iGQXet) **Critical race theory teaches children they are either oppressors or they are oppressed, sowing division among our youth and setting us back in the great progress we’ve made as a country. ** **The theory teaches that the Constitution and Declaration of Independence are racist documents.[_This is anti-American, and we must STOP IT! _](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1Z6WrvXv3I17mMseq9Xcaq)** **Educators should teach our children to love and respect one another and be PROUD to be Americans. That doesn’t mean not teaching about some of the more shameful parts of our history--but it also means acknowledging that our institutions and country have the unique ability to grow to a more perfect union. ** ****Will you stand with me and other Republican Senators in denouncing this racist, anti-American propaganda?**** [**_WE WANT TO HEAR FROM YOU- do you support teaching critical race theory in the classroom?_**](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1Z77XRgAnWSjsWekxD3r6n) **Our children are our future, and we must do everything we can to protect them. Please stand with us in the fight to end this radical indoctrination. ** [**_< <CLICK HERE to tell us what you think of critical race theory>>_**](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1Z7juczFIbJvz60qF69G2k) **Thank you for your support,** **Jim Inhofe**

---
| | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIM INHOFE
---
PO Box 13300

Oklahoma City, OK 73113
| [ ]()
---

| | Dear , **I am starting the #ProveIt campaign right now.** I am sick and tired of the liberal officials and media gaslighting us with fictitious attacks about the election - but they are doing everything they can to STOP our forensic audits and efforts to find out the truth.

We’ve already shown evidence of fraud - now it’s time for them to prove it wasn’t.

**_So I want them to #ProveIt_** \- prove that there was no fraud in the election. Prove that the machines can't access the internet. Prove that the ballots are all there. Prove that the votes weren't changed. Prove that the 3 am November 4th vote dump was legitimate. Prove that sharpies weren't given to Trump voters on election day. Prove that our elections weren't hacked. Prove it!

If you agree that the #FakeNews and the liberal officials need to PROVE IT - [you can proudly show your stance by buying one of my Prove it T-Shirts now](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f0a552176d&e=44b8c466b0). You will be among the first to wear one as I literally just got back from the print shop myself.

Now, when you buy one I want everyone to take a picture of themselves, their families and friends with the T-Shirt on and post it to social media. _Tag my profile and use the hashtag #ProveIt._ In your post, state what you want the left to prove since they are making wild claims about the election.

I am about to get on a plane to fly and speak to a huge audience of thousands of people and I am going to put the shirt on in front of them. They will sell out like gangbusters - so that is why I am telling you before I go up on stage. I want you to have a chance to buy the first batch.

ORDER YOURS TODAY: [https://secure.anedot.com/mark-finchem-for-secretary-of-state/proveit](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7693d2bc67&e=44b8c466b0)

body:

Jim Jordan’s appointment to the Jan. 6th Select Committee. Pelosi and the Democrats want to silence Jim Banks and Jim Jordan because she knows they would call out their utter hypocrisy and blatant attacks on conservative voters.

Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. **[Agree or disagree?](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=fa0d7a94a14e41458721294493a3f484&_e=VEIho8wqPYx-JXnkGkqr-6nS7SLZMnO6LgoNwYfjyF33x5vsYyNaiGQG0r70w9t7lSnssuU5jPCLJMa_K8UCZ-0idWUgv1Lk2I7np2KtZKCsAV4rKSgdL_7qUn1bLt68GbHZc_rfgt0BOGeQVtRf_psNFygJGLzBQQByVANKkcbGa_dZWEi7xAzgnBwmUIAaQoZgjQ2gq7XZutTrmiH51T0UWhZqZ6uIgRShc6A9OM97IkdIxJY9e6Xeclmm1hi0NoPemRiz0XWqzpFr2nd454HHjepUGqsOtiaIbvyCZF8xXTWV39GOJ44aiJ_PiosSZ_6D-MkO7U4gX75pZSHJISQdzN4wPqgSMDaLOYjQ9-Z37drtXk7lqJYuCMv96avEh1uLhwK-bQOOcMOG1PYd7bkSug3bO54Bm0CuoDadGgiJ7wrySUW28bAJiCo_u3Br3QC9KNfIbPNMqqdXZMFVFDykJf0llhtyhqW2h3hVa-k-Ys6YIDkEtb-J9Z5yNBhI-XfTfvBlYsv1Hd3l4brpCA%3D%3D)**

There is no sugarcoating the fact that our country’s past is full of events that have left painful scars, but we’ve learned from the mistakes of our ancestors, and we continue to work to improve on our imperfect union. But if you talk to a liberal, chances are they’re going to tell you that America is an inherently racist country. And that the Constitution itself is racist.

**How absurd**.

Peter, it’s critically important that my team, as well as the entire Republican Party knows where you stand on this issue, **particularly in light of the fact that the nation’s largest teacher’s union just endorsed teaching critical race theory to our middle and high school students**.

Why would we ever teach our children that Americans are created unequal?

name: Cicely Davis
subject: I'm Running Against Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1973d4d7826e415b8859b5d422314526&_e=QDg-l7Gn7EQKstaXLuYpgUt1qqiDFULkGcrofo3ZImcMpiA4SOYpt1JTtd3ywB6sW0kx_qmV5jpx5SQHSiClkml0HisX9v9Qiyt3LiBGascGzFfrQr02Kny2fdZL9JsCCNCimRdaT8sE7x51GaHABneM8TfSD4bKmw7WsydZo4wUG0yAAD_9DUkVGnsfLYtG3YGDlaJb5RcRnly1lo8Xby-FD8f74gME77vUTD-RvSkjDfISg_ja6m93_48tP_FOnKrRaVmYsDTiJlXUNMnGOStbb6VgWpa6hm4HAIM53egENL15iLiND7RkpwFcij1N8GqaCKQPS71C_6_C3NxN_j-8tTLruh0Sx3xzQbujnTDpBXynDBD4iZ8TnqEDWSYayEIe-HhhkGmKpxH0DvVUlg%3D%3D)

---

Fellow American,

I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: **hard work and the American Dream.**

My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home.

If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. **I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end.**

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1973d4d7826e415b8859b5d422314526&_e=QDg-l7Gn7EQKstaXLuYpgUt1qqiDFULkGcrofo3ZImcMpiA4SOYpt1JTtd3ywB6sW0kx_qmV5jpx5SQHSiClkml0HisX9v9Qiyt3LiBGascGzFfrQr02Kny2fdZL9JsCCNCimRdaT8sE7x51GaHABneM8TfSD4bKmw7WsydZo4wKy2pPmMygXPQJb_L6ZSpgOlosuvjLgkNm-wcweSBetwR5HuIeAKMS-vabVrdaglFAyruqenMB1rZ56Ac2D3SCna7335KA1daC9rjn-JMHNrDUIHSpBCXlvPNkQ1Qls_sqYmqkFZCAGxF247E900jrWU5BwUjPJxVCj25-6xSJSqm68vqTDVGCvzhaoLwwEPzjp5Efn-0Q_mJ9me_fabkwrpWwCgJ9KjNuRF3l2YTe5A%3D%3D)
For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. **She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police,** **now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year.**

Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out?** [**If you’ve had enough, then it’s time to take a stand.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1973d4d7826e415b8859b5d422314526&_e=QDg-l7Gn7EQKstaXLuYpgUt1qqiDFULkGcrofo3ZImcMpiA4SOYpt1JTtd3ywB6sW0kx_qmV5jpx5SQHSiClkml0HisX9v9Qiyt3LiBGascGzFfrQr02Kny2fdZL9JsCCNCimRdaT8sE7x51GaHABneM8TfSD4bKmw7WsydZo4zYPOajLXI8q6cpL8N6wry6rE5fytRAkjMBN5OsoIQySRwuIzzg7goiPFrX3wi4kwRRisKV6iM5YP6TNQEPPS0HhhWYPJ0Ut_1Jr2sNUpVK8S5OkUPnYhNlvmMM9M-XeE_A9qFO8vEgMR4YPHW3YpMiFzy98ule-5AAxu98leGxzfTJFpnGEYRYEjIVD99srqkc1kFOpaUj3e6czAA0YzXyevEoz4EzRnPPCvV7kvMFsg%3D%3D)

[**Fellow American, will you help me kick off my campaign by sending $10, $25, $50, $100 or more?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1973d4d7826e415b8859b5d422314526&_e=QDg-l7Gn7EQKstaXLuYpgUt1qqiDFULkGcrofo3ZImcMpiA4SOYpt1JTtd3ywB6sW0kx_qmV5jpx5SQHSiClkml0HisX9v9Qiyt3LiBGascGzFfrQr02Kny2fdZL9JsCCNCimRdaT8sE7x51GaHABneM8TfSD4bKmw7WsydZo4zDOddEBdX-NV94thw6JOhkGHxF7ylkguRAoLSNdgVtdFAhGlquopI3_HPu0Sv9mRd7DnApQGNwkfDp5A1He9abDT3ze8ardI2wpsHqxafybB7vydJZuUOV0oHQtwlb9u6CAhQ0zY_crL9NvuTs0GNCcP-KCLxuUCw4GNOwa6sO2x2TC8ynl0sDjPLstfhfhC47xEYpi77twtvMkBDAMfx5Y1nXDb-ChLc47mJcbjgmLQ%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1973d4d7826e415b8859b5d422314526&_e=QDg-l7Gn7EQKstaXLuYpgUt1qqiDFULkGcrofo3ZImcMpiA4SOYpt1JTtd3ywB6sW0kx_qmV5jpx5SQHSiClkml0HisX9v9Qiyt3LiBGascGzFfrQr02Kny2fdZL9JsCCNCimRdaT8sE7x51GaHABneM8TfSD4bKmw7WsydZo4zlS7G6Sn7j-s_BAkDfcmNpm8Tix5uRVeIL2uYtUff6Hy3JcaApM2_vX7kf0ytCFMTCxuzzjT0XJKjOd_4YoxwCfbP8hcq_ttDF17BB3rjPNhGe4mW2BzgKv7dDx4w9M3ZUlR8vOg5ynBhYx-zudy6DzhI-O0xJgdSbQYk03iUL_YL5JVjVvAFfNI3J2x4440KJKs6SbTm1LDAu90flMKYtFIjTyyrEYn6gydstopBCJQ%3D%3D)
I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time.

**I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. This is your chance to make a real difference,** [**support me today and let’s kick Ilhan Omar out of Congress.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1973d4d7826e415b8859b5d422314526&_e=QDg-l7Gn7EQKstaXLuYpgUt1qqiDFULkGcrofo3ZImcMpiA4SOYpt1JTtd3ywB6sW0kx_qmV5jpx5SQHSiClkml0HisX9v9Qiyt3LiBGascGzFfrQr02Kny2fdZL9JsCCNCimRdaT8sE7x51GaHABneM8TfSD4bKmw7WsydZo4zsL3MvAqVOpHA1Lkb9HxUWl3rm8L9yWXyuarpoDsj7-NJzwsHd1lQuYu32uFeeoW2pgqxYus2JJryl51y0jUpiCo14LB6ibaLEzAU7i-H92Qrdoj9avpBF9c5IpNAuMj2BelY0hF2Yx6FIMyTwrXav5w9xpWx2pLlr3gztqKBPZZZEAanoG3PCHCyxi2Z4FuDMRTo_elAOyCznAFsypSvIhNK60uGTfMOrlB9gEGmCJg%3D%3D)

For America,

clean_body: Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | Fellow American, I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: hard work and the American Dream. My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home. If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end. For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police, now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year. Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out? I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time. I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. This is your chance to make a real difference, For America, Cicely Davis | | PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Erica Smith
subject: dirty money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Did you know this?
#
Did you know that our campaign is the ONLY one in our race for North Carolina’s U.S. Senate seat that’s taken the _No Fossil Fuel Money Pledge_?
I don’t take a _dime_ of fossil fuel money because you simply can’t build a movement to take real, bold action on climate when you’re beholden to the fossil fuel industry.
[**Our campaign is fueled by small-dollar donations from folks like you, not Exxon — or any other oil or gas company. So if you believe in our movement, make a $10 donation right now.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5813?refcode=em20210721-274&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=274%2E3698%2ExwWcd-)
**[Contribute $10](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5813?refcode=em20210721-274&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=274%2E3698%2ExwWcd-)**
**The climate crisis is already here.** Fires and floods are destroying our communities, taking lives and livelihoods across the country.
But corporate polluters continue to use their dirty money to corrupt our political system — backing anti-protest legislation across the country and blocking the bold action our communities demand to confront climate change, like the Green New Deal.
**I’m proud that I’m the only candidate in this primary with a Green New Deal front and center in our platform. I’m proud to reject contributions from the fossil fuel industry. And I’m proud that we’re building a diverse, working-class coalition for progressive change.**
[**Will you please make a $10 donation to our campaign for the U.S. Senate? When I’m elected, I will fight like hell to pass bold, transformative policies like the Green New Deal and deliver environmental justice for all of our communities. Every donation will make a big impact.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5813?refcode=em20210721-274&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=274%2E3698%2ExwWcd-)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5813?refcode=em20210721-274&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=274%2E3698%2ExwWcd-)
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210721-274-footer&t=23&refcode2=274_3698_xwWcd-&akid=274%2E3698%2ExwWcd-)**

Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

body:

I want to know your thoughts on the Radical-L Peter, My survey on Critical Race Theory is closing TONIGHT at midnight, and I want to hear from you! Should teachers be teaching Critical Race Theory in schools? Should Newsom and the Far-Left be able to push their woke agendas on the future generations? clean_body: Just wanted to make sure that you got my last email and have had a chance to respond with your thoughts. I want to know your thoughts on the Radical-L Peter, My survey on Critical Race Theory is closing TONIGHT at midnight, and I want to hear from you! Should teachers be teaching Critical Race Theory in schools? Should Newsom and the Far-Left be able to push their woke agendas on the future generations? Joe Biden and the Radical Left plan to drive division amongst Americans all throughout the country. They also plan to jeopardize the education system we hold so highly, just to push across their agendas. In a time when Gavin Newsom needs to stand against and protect our fine state, instead he encourages the radical left in their goal of division and jeopardization of the education system. Should Biden and the Radical Left be able to push their agendas in school? Do you support Newsom allowing Critical Race Theory to be taught to our children? No child should have to grow up being falsely taught that the country that he or she loves is systematically racist, or that he or she is racist just because of their skin color. Thank you for your responses and for your continued support. \-- Doug Ose | | PAID FOR BY OSE FOR GOVERNOR Click to unsubscribe.

**BREAKING news, friend: Ted Cruz (R-Texas) just endorsed Marco's Republican opponent.**
The same Ted Cruz who abandoned his state in a natural disaster to go sip piña coladas on a beach. The same Ted Cruz who votes with Trump 100% of the time. The same Ted Cruz who helped Trump launch an attempted insurrection against the U.S. Capitol to silence your votes and steal the election.
**This is no longer just about flipping Arizona blue. It's about defending our state from the kind of GOP extremism that led to the Capitol insurrection on Jan. 6. [That's why we're setting an emergency goal to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight so we can power our movement to flip the governorship for Democrats and defeat GOP extremism once and for all. Ted Cruz's brand of Republican extremism isn't new to Arizona. This same thinking is what led to the Arizona GOP's sham "election audit" and the 23 voter suppression bills moving through our state legislature. Our leaders are more concerned with conspiracies, lies and, apparently, Ted Cruz, than they are with addressing the real challenges facing working people.
Now, we have a chance to defeat GOP extremism in Arizona and flip our state blue so we can transform our broken education system, expand affordable health care and protect our rights. This news turns that chance into an obligation. And **the good news is, Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is already calling this race a toss-up, which means Democrats have a real shot at winning. But the bad news is that if we fail to hit our emergency goal, we'll be outspent by the GOP's millions.**
**[Right now, with this breaking news still making headlines, we need to fight back and show we're stronger than the worst of the GOP. **Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Hope to catch you on the campaign trail!
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wd_kSnzZQSCpeN6NGbNIHT0osRVghfZd4pwXVI4zqrWu5IUXfLKllo2mQCRW79ULbW4sDKH_FbshC5vMLedvU2aZUQQ9FdYyWM6U8dkXnOdy7w96G0DWgurVcSJ5cxXrSR-jeTgL04Hx1a0kndPPrRt8rTYv3nEB-erjrjaCBs6pcPNUl34Ihw==&c=qpCM6NOaEh_FZki9rnWYQQ5WDBK1ElicbUjveJ021n24h_YaPWwGlA==&ch=Vwk1woPNodMEn_iHvMXnyZNXiOn24Wp-YPXf_JhfnEROAFdTuBb-fA==)
---
| Peter,
Throughout July, my campaign has been criss-crossing the state, hosting events, and meeting voters.
---
|
---
|
---
I participated in a candidate forum at the Spanish American Committee to discuss public policy and working with the Latino community.
---
| #TeamGibbons was out in full force for the 4th of July. We kicked off the weekend at the Parma Independence Day parade.
---
|
---

---
|
---
|
---
| Then we were on the parade route again in West Park.
---
|
---
|
---
| Next, we headed down to Dayton for two stops on our statewide Back to Business tour. We stopped first at Carl's Body Shop and discussed how to keep the government out of the way of businesses by reducing burdensome regulations and excessive taxation.
Then we hosted a roundtable at the Dublin Pub restaurant, where I further discussed the impact of business regulations, tax policies, and reopening post pandemic with attendees.
---
|
---
Carl's Body Shop
---
|
---
Dublin Pub
---
| Dayton 24/7 Now: [U.S. Senate candidate Mike Gibbons visits Dayton, talks jobs and businesses](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wd_kSnzZQSCpeN6NGbNIHT0osRVghfZd4pwXVI4zqrWu5IUXfLKlllzwXLMu6wMKEXdpN-JH8lcwVay3Q23e9zgfeHA1AwBlJ22C-gVodHY4Bnk3ad2tsjsJ6IQy-dQmI0JmzL_LOzgQFj8WnPnLSglq53IHo6tGy4WrKFMBJ5SIAhqOKKOAYZXs2RlDw_KL3-9_lCwiXjaT5mLe4ncjcRETHKtPJonIfrNuPioEpVSQtObqFuneCnetgVcHRvgkGAvHvfkXKdg=&c=qpCM6NOaEh_FZki9rnWYQQ5WDBK1ElicbUjveJ021n24h_YaPWwGlA==&ch=Vwk1woPNodMEn_iHvMXnyZNXiOn24Wp-YPXf_JhfnEROAFdTuBb-fA==)
---
|
---
| "I don't think that the politicians that we put in office recognize how jobs are created, and how we can draw other jobs to the state...Jobs are created by businesses, and not by politicians," [Gibbons] said, adding that it's not the government that can create new jobs.

I was also a guest host on the Monday Night Roundtable radio show on 1220 AM in Cleveland where we chatted about my campaign, being endorsed by Sen. Rand Paul, and a wide array of important issues facing our country. Listen to the interview [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wd_kSnzZQSCpeN6NGbNIHT0osRVghfZd4pwXVI4zqrWu5IUXfLKlllzwXLMu6wMKxrZOS-Y2C7xc7vtCYIRTGhPykou6J6e0WX8I1jrOa-kiKHBIeiWMQw_JFzwGH45LdNbjAyArys2L4BEm4DBnlC2Ql64MgmJZPPIQdVxdeew5rrWIQJYRJg==&c=qpCM6NOaEh_FZki9rnWYQQ5WDBK1ElicbUjveJ021n24h_YaPWwGlA==&ch=Vwk1woPNodMEn_iHvMXnyZNXiOn24Wp-YPXf_JhfnEROAFdTuBb-fA==).
---
|
---
|
---
| My candidacy was featured in the Ohio Star, where I explained that you need representatives who have experience in the real world, and why we really need a different set of players running for public office. Read the full profile [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wd_kSnzZQSCpeN6NGbNIHT0osRVghfZd4pwXVI4zqrWu5IUXfLKlllzwXLMu6wMKtIGFPvBTevum5oqMU8WQz0x3yWwfRAQQ1lVJBVw1MvoOkXLYMuGucoEL_CiJcdMHGi4yY7-KJqeCFN-Oc8MHxr1ey2-WmYOHFgsVDFpkJLnz46jvCireQKZ8th9Vi2yYOwuW2CPgPPqg09uS2p7iyLr5nXVtDfS_GhV-SmqDlg_0JQZKP1HEQiWdjgeS3QpXtE0DZEbLR3tfVvgRlmJEOA==&c=qpCM6NOaEh_FZki9rnWYQQ5WDBK1ElicbUjveJ021n24h_YaPWwGlA==&ch=Vwk1woPNodMEn_iHvMXnyZNXiOn24Wp-YPXf_JhfnEROAFdTuBb-fA==).

Then we were off to the [Paulding County U.S. Senate Candidate Forum.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wd_kSnzZQSCpeN6NGbNIHT0osRVghfZd4pwXVI4zqrWu5IUXfLKlllzwXLMu6wMKsvnA92hmpGav2Wkvyahc1-jTpJEiAL-TxQqnvnoDgymcxosX_XMehc3HM7PKNo_bOjDNe0Ayai5fvrr8QDMjslxY7wexFCU-XqexygRUiPlbJKKqdjt_3jJQpDlsp9paLQfaQtDfSAVy-isKvw19TyD5Rp8c3kNNWEUhyPixdWSdx5NHVZMCqL9ePh58Rawor8lokymOUXsACwQdFzYVyw==&c=qpCM6NOaEh_FZki9rnWYQQ5WDBK1ElicbUjveJ021n24h_YaPWwGlA==&ch=Vwk1woPNodMEn_iHvMXnyZNXiOn24Wp-YPXf_JhfnEROAFdTuBb-fA==)
---
|
---
| My campaign will continue to travel to all corners of the Buckeye State. I will continue to meet with voters and win their support in my run for Senate. In August, we will be launching an statewide 88 county tour. I hope to see you on the trail soon!
---

We stopped first at Carl's Body Shop and discussed how to keep the government out of the way of businesses by reducing burdensome regulations and excessive taxation. Then we hosted a roundtable at the Dublin Pub restaurant, where I further discussed the impact of business regulations, tax policies, and reopening post pandemic with attendees. | Carl's Body Shop | Dublin Pub | Dayton 24/7 Now: == | | "I don't think that the politicians that we put in office recognize how jobs are created, and how we can draw other jobs to the state...Jobs are created by businesses, and not by politicians," [Gibbons] said, adding that it's not the government that can create new jobs. I was also a guest host on the Monday Night Roundtable radio show on 1220 AM in Cleveland where we chatted about my campaign, being endorsed by Sen. Rand Paul, and a wide array of important issues facing our country. Listen to the interview ==. | | | My candidacy was featured in the Ohio Star, where I explained that you need representatives who have experience in the real world, and why we really need a different set of players running for public office. Read the full profile ==. Then we were off to the == | | My campaign will continue to travel to all corners of the Buckeye State. I will continue to meet with voters and win their support in my run for Senate. In August, we will be launching an statewide 88 county tour. I hope to see you on the trail soon! | | | == | Thank you, | Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate | | | | | == | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | | Gibbons for Ohio | 1650 E 55th St, #603679, Cleveland, OH 44103 | | Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com powered by

But Lake Mead has dropped to its lowest point since the 1930s. The bathtub ring around Lake Mead highlights where water levels were and is a dire example of the water shortage facing the district. That’s why Susie's proud to introduce the _Large Scale Water Recycling Project Investment Act_ , which will create a water recycling grant program for projects across 17 Western states. This is an investment in projects that will help our water supply. Team, you know how critical Lake Mead is to Nevada -- and the Western part of the U.S. [**Can Susie count on you to sign on and become a citizen co-sponsor of her bill?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32773917/296826929/-1893954052?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODIzZjZjNi03ZmVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T1X-yxiICedbtF9ARckKlf3sPB-ZI5Caoa4Ydx_pII4=&emci=240f73bd-7fe9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a823f6c6-7fea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957) | | | [Sign to Become a Citizen Co-Sponsor →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32773920/296826932/-1893954052?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODIzZjZjNi03ZmVhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T1X-yxiICedbtF9ARckKlf3sPB-ZI5Caoa4Ydx_pII4=&emci=240f73bd-7fe9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a823f6c6-7fea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)

Susie needs all the support she can get, which includes getting you to sign on as a citizen co-sponsor to this critical bill. Did you know that Virginias 7th district Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger took more money from Teacher Unions than any other member of congress?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Sign my last-minute petition to keep building the Border Wall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/sign-my-last-minute-petition-to-keep-building-the-border-wall?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=267f840599&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter, We are on the verge of total anarchy at the Southern Border. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are waving illegal aliens from all over the world into America with their open borders policies. Now, they want to stop Border Wall construction permanently. In Arizona, we’re taking them to court to try to stop them as a last-minute effort to maintain control at the Border: But no matter the outcome of our court battle, I will never stop fighting to secure our Borders. That was -- and still is -- the number one goal of the America First movement. As President Trump, who called me a “warrior,” said so perfectly: you can’t have a country if you don’t have Borders. [**Demand that Border Wall construction continues by signing my “Keep Building the Wall” petition right away**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f44ddef404&e=645b3b1338). [**By putting your signature on my petition today, you’re showing Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the rest of the far-left crazies just how wrong they are for thinking the America First movement is finished**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=540af47899&e=645b3b1338). Do you know what I hear too often, fellow Patriot? Our critics in the far-left media say that Republicans don’t stand for anything anymore. They say we just stand against things we don’t like. I want to make this perfectly clear to those scoundrels: I stand for closed Borders, national sovereignty and security, and putting America First. [**I know you do too, and by signing my “Keep Building the Wall” petition today, you’re showing them exactly what you stand for**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=6979335218&e=645b3b1338). [**Sign my “Keep Building the Wall” petition right away, and show the radical left that we’re still mobilizing to secure the Border**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=aacf903d26&e=645b3b1338). We should not have to battle over Border Security. It should be common sense. Every civilized nation on earth has closed Borders. But since radical Communist Democrats are not civilized, we are in for a long battle. Not even President Trump -- who was stronger on borders than any President in modern history -- could finish the job. It’s up to us to keep fighting until it finally gets done. That process starts with you, and it starts today. [**Sign my “Keep Building the Wall” petition and stand with me as I keep pushing to close the Border for good**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=2c313b5b48&e=645b3b1338). [**We need a groundswell of support from Americans across the country to show the radical Democrats that we’re still in the fight, so after you sign the petition, make sure you forward this message to at least five of your patriotic friends and family, and ask them to sign it too**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e1ebd3769f&e=645b3b1338). I can’t do this without you. The America First movement is strongest when we work together. I’m carrying President Trump’s America First torch, and working everyday to make his goal of closing the borders a reality. For that, I am loathed by the RINOs and the Communist Democrats in Washington. They’ll do anything they can to stop me. [**So after you sign my “Keep Building the Wall” petition, I need you to chip into my reelection campaign**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=46b1d1a0c4&e=645b3b1338). The Special Interests in D.C. want me gone so I can’t carry President Trump’s torch, and they’ll spend whatever they have to -- possibly MILLIONS of dollars -- to stop me. [**That’s why I need you to contribute what you can to my reelection campaign today, too**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b0bf689d4e&e=645b3b1338). As always, I’m proud to have your support, and I thank you for helping me out. God bless you. For America, Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are doing their best to reopen our borders to the entire world, and flood our country with third-world illegal aliens. [**Sign my “Keep Building the Wall” petition today and demand closed Borders and****national sovereignty -- and share this petition with your friends and family so they can do the same**. ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5bb968f1aa&e=645b3b1338)
---

---
| Yours in the fight, [](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=af28502f54&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District

That was -- and still is -- the number one goal of the America First movement. As President Trump, who called me a “warrior,” said so perfectly: you can’t have a country if you don’t have Borders. . . Do you know what I hear too often, fellow Patriot? Our critics in the far-left media say that Republicans don’t stand for anything anymore. They say we just stand against things we don’t like. I want to make this perfectly clear to those scoundrels: I stand for closed Borders, national sovereignty and security, and putting America First. . . We should not have to battle over Border Security. It should be common sense. Every civilized nation on earth has closed Borders. But since radical Communist Democrats are not civilized, we are in for a long battle. Not even President Trump -- who was stronger on borders than any President in modern history -- could finish the job. It’s up to us to keep fighting until it finally gets done. That process starts with you, and it starts today. . . I can’t do this without you. The America First movement is strongest when we work together. I’m carrying President Trump’s America First torch, and working everyday to make his goal of closing the borders a reality. For that, I am loathed by the RINOs and the Communist Democrats in Washington. They’ll do anything they can to stop me. . The Special Interests in D.C. want me gone so I can’t carry President Trump’s torch, and they’ll spend whatever they have to -- possibly MILLIONS of dollars -- to stop me. . As always, I’m proud to have your support, and I thank you for helping me out. God bless you. For America, Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District P.S. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are doing their best to reopen our borders to the entire world, and flood our country with third-world illegal aliens. | "DONATE" | Yours in the fight, Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS | Copyright © 2021 Paul Gosar for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Three reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It is imperative that Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez wins her re-election and stays in Congress.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210721-2293-header&t=1&akid=2293%2E2526796%2Ex4ZGig)
We want to take a minute to explain why [making your first donation to our campaign today will go a long way, if you’re able to pitch in. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210721-3?refcode=em20210721-2293-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2293_2526796_x4ZGig&akid=2293%2E2526796%2Ex4ZGig)
1. **The primary is less than a year away** , and hitting our July 2021 goal is a critical step in our plan to strengthen our campaign, fight back against dark money and disinformation, and win. If we fall short, we may need to scale back our plans — and we need to be prepared for anything the GOP throws at us this cycle.
2. **Our campaign isn’t just active when it’s a voting year.** We use your contributions to invest in keeping organizing staff on the ground, continuing volunteer work year-round, and building momentum for key policies across the country.
3. **Our fundraising model depends on $5, $10, and $15 donations at a time.** 82% of all the money we’ve raised has come from small-dollar donors. That’s a higher percentage than anyone else — Republican or Democrat — in the House. We don’t take money from corporate PACS, lobbyists, energy interests or real estate developers, or from law enforcement sources.

We understand that not everyone is in the place to make a donation right now, and we completely understand. [But our fundraising is not where it needs to be, so if you’re able to make your first donation of $3 — or anything you can — it will go a long way in helping to hit our July 2021 goal and power our campaign to keep Alexandria in Congress. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210721-3?refcode=em20210721-2293-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2293_2526796_x4ZGig&akid=2293%2E2526796%2Ex4ZGig)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210721-3?refcode=em20210721-2293-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2293_2526796_x4ZGig&akid=2293%2E2526796%2Ex4ZGig)**
Anything you can do to help would mean a lot as we approach our end-of-month deadline next week.
With thanks,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210721-3?refcode=em20210721-2293-P&t=23&refcode2=2293_2526796_x4ZGig&akid=2293%2E2526796%2Ex4ZGig)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=2293%2E2526796%2Ex4ZGig) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=2293%2E2526796%2Ex4ZGig) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=2293%2E2526796%2Ex4ZGig)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=2293%2E2526796%2Ex4ZGig)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2293%2E2526796%2Ex4ZGig)

subject: , MSDH Director Dobbs calls Mississippians Nazis and Monkeys
body:

| MSDH Director Dobbs calls Mississippians Nazis and Monkeys
---

| |
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzM0OTQ4NzAwMjc2Mzk4NTE0JmM9ZTV4NyZlPTAmYj02NjQxMjQxNzMmZD1lOWQ2dzl4.3IhZvgYKZz5O-zLAtXf3UyPldOrel151yCzP5Yl4ztw)
---|---
##### June 21, 2021
## "An immoral people, create a weak nation"
What happens when a bureaucrat is suddenly given notoriety and unlimited power over your life and personal decisions? Well, the answer is never anything good. We’ve seen it play out with Dr. Anthony Fauci, and now it appears to have replicated itself in Mississippi State Department of Health Director Dr. Thomas Dobbs.
In the spirit of the Biden administration‘s proposal to go door to door tracking your personal health decisions and pressure you into doing what they tell you to do, Dr. Dobbs has decided that if you question his medical superiority, you are nothing more than an “anti-science nazi” or “excuse monkey”.
In a round table zoom call last week, Dr. Dobbs wasted no time letting all of us know that “if enough Mississippians can’t make the right decision and get immunized, then we’ll have to do the draconian measures to keep the health system operational”.
During this hour long diatribe we were told, “You want your freedom, get vaccinated, and you’ll get your freedom back“. The discussions went on about forcing our children to wear masks when school starts back, unless they’re vaccinated, and now we see organizations like UMMC, along with other hospitals and nursing homes threatening termination for employees who don’t comply with health department recommendations.
Never mind that none of the Covid vaccines have received proper vetting or FDA approval, and according to federal law, and in light of the Nuremberg trials that followed Nazi Germany‘s fall, it is illegal to mandate an experimental or emergency use drug or vaccine.
Dr. Dobbs and the Mississippi Department of Health do not grant the people of Mississippi our rights and freedoms. We do not answer to Dr. Dobbs, he answers to the people of Mississippi.
When an employee of the people of the Great State of Mississippi expresses such distain and disrespect for his employer it is time for him to move on to another job. The people of Mississippi should not be subjected to a public employee calling them “monkey’s” or “nazis”.
It is time that we the people stand up and remind the bureaucrats and politicians that they are not the author or grantors of our freedom. In Dr. Dobbs’ half-hearted apology he still called any Mississippian who thinks differently than him “disillusioned people”.
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus and the people of Mississippi ask Governor Reeves to immediately remove Dr. Dobbs from his position and replace him with a professional who respects the people of our state.
[**Click here and join the Mississippi Freedom Caucus calling for Governor Reeves to, **](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzM0OTQ4NzAwMjc2Mzk4NTE0JmM9ZTV4NyZlPTAmYj02NjQxMjQxODgmZD1lNXMzbDVs.b18DGMnt_b7Ngizj-CihhwUx5vfefsgCFeEsS5dvG_g)
[**FIRE DOBBS NOW!**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzM0OTQ4NzAwMjc2Mzk4NTE0JmM9ZTV4NyZlPTAmYj02NjQxMjQyMDAmZD10MXY1ZjBq.LSbLJofxhXEJT8UCKMDylmdXC6YfFOQpDQcmRz9BEHs)

The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is founded by elected officials who believe in freedom and liberty for the people of Mississippi. We are the voice of citizens who want bold action to protect life, strengthen families, defend our constitutional rights, limit government, and revitalize personal and economic freedoms in the state of Mississippi.
| [Find out more](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzM0OTQ4NzAwMjc2Mzk4NTE0JmM9ZTV4NyZlPTAmYj02NjQxMjQyNTQmZD1qM2QwbjJt.aB268e4aTAzRL2rpGfsQyfWow9KAzKy55k_a6qiuqIw)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Biden's first 6 months...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
Let’s bring the amazingly bad Biden-Harris-Schumer Democrat agenda to a screeching halt! Support our GOP fight to Reclaim the Majority today! Let's bring the amazingly bad Biden-Harris-Schumer Democrat agenda to a screeching halt! Support our GOP fight to Reclaim the Majority today! | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=77f7f152aa2a4f6cb90e5d89c99c4ef7&_e=DMvxZ9XCCnIiTlP_f_trhokY5PdWdMftAJR6RSNZDBFuSTS8LtiCriZ8vHzfoGAqpLIEjSvOfBbfIA0YxVltSCjhZGFNE6guZfpNTallx0NMd2_9oMY6EmtOPqDh_YRfCC_5cqvJok1wWMcFze3AB_gdotGKbWYoa0oD-JHyBuyQLO-QR8ItbKSsfbqvOyD2Dj525VnQ9ODoeDuG6fowOgyGyTScV3OmFQHYx3g21kBfu_XDGCQd35ZTysvsa9rs2b3RQt1IllqLaANaVhXuDppkfJLd8axtsCdtwP7KLSz5XL68DTmlhoMjKmiT6X1YvlHY-6ltPVaxvwYUuedQm8qavWJv68ghqw-wUBOqAPurQ_HnM57jhPB8k-ovCiRgmzrb2r80DP2O6t-e-2m2UA_bPyaC6_Ac288uJSBTg4F4NtVg-urvyOnzVI8989igeilf_vNte8-N-87IKs28FNYkPD5WWXSAeV_PPskVdms%3D)
---
Fellow American,

**President Joe Biden's first six months in office have been _amazingly bad._**

[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=77f7f152aa2a4f6cb90e5d89c99c4ef7&_e=DMvxZ9XCCnIiTlP_f_trhokY5PdWdMftAJR6RSNZDBFuSTS8LtiCriZ8vHzfoGAqpLIEjSvOfBbfIA0YxVltSCjhZGFNE6guZfpNTallx0NMd2_9oMY6EmtOPqDh_YRfCC_5cqvJok1wWMcFze3AB_gdotGKbWYoa0oD-JHyBuyQLO-QR8ItbKSsfbqvOyD2Dj525VnQ9ODoeDuG6fowOgyGyTScV3OmFQHYx3g21kBfu_XDGCQd35ZTysvsa9rs2b3RQt1IllqLaANaVhXuDhEWDJPbmeDAThJQgsrn_LDQ2-FRWGOXdcjanxn_Bh5ytkGybJ_o7YWXxg82zpg91v_wj5ZXKgQW9FZ6yGk7J-9bl1a-r77WsXi7tslEHLmDEZvatgwcwax6jtq4kF7jO06fiEQY2jDZIj5LOVY_RnUEJMz3hpZU1mfO_ty-gsa43l7x_GcHfgsVjmF0qW6g2SGyfD2mkP78qWEpke1ZqaE%3D)
Our southern border with Mexico is in chaos. We are seeing the highest levels of illegal immigration in _21 years_ with Customs and Border Patrol officers apprehending more than **1 million** migrants crossing the border this fiscal year.

In Afghanistan, where U.S. forces are completing a pullout, the radical Islamic insurgents of the Taliban are on the rise, executing prisoners and threatening to **reconquer the entire country.**

Meanwhile, China continues its aggressive military modernization program, flexing its muscles in the South China Sea, threatening Taiwan and our allies in the western Pacific.

_Here at home_ , bad policies, massive spending, and tax increase proposals are driving up prices and inflation for workers and families, while raising the national debt above $28 trillion.

| [**Reclaim The Majority ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=77f7f152aa2a4f6cb90e5d89c99c4ef7&_e=DMvxZ9XCCnIiTlP_f_trhokY5PdWdMftAJR6RSNZDBFuSTS8LtiCriZ8vHzfoGAqpLIEjSvOfBbfIA0YxVltSCjhZGFNE6guZfpNTallx0NMd2_9oMY6EmtOPqDh_YRfCC_5cqvJok1wWMcFze3AB_gdotGKbWYoa0oD-JHyBuyQLO-QR8ItbKSsfbqvOyD2Dj525VnQ9ODoeDuG6fowOgyGyTScV3OmFQHYx3g21kBfu_XDGCQd35ZTysvsa9rs2b3RQt1IllqLaANaVhXuDsS0WxI1wTCKnQGqvA0BOZd41lfR2UTbSUPp_hLCdzR3SkHzJQXTY3XBqM9LeTmNEBbnoXmhl9eiNaBJVCI_QDTfbAB_SQuRU-dJNv7Ll7b9B1B0p2mkmABsXK3RquU1n9qwMI7tE1D6gfSVIMNIBFIWtHeu0seOFq6-9bEZvLHgqB6EfuPYZjx9iWhoYoy6srTL8E2xk_RZaPO7ENT5m34%3D)
---

Fellow American, I'm sure you'll agree - the Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security, **and we MUST reclaim our crucial Republican Senate Majority to pull our country out of this leftist tailspin.**

That's why I founded the **RECLAIM THE MAJORITY** project, **[and it is why I'm contacting you today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=77f7f152aa2a4f6cb90e5d89c99c4ef7&_e=DMvxZ9XCCnIiTlP_f_trhokY5PdWdMftAJR6RSNZDBFuSTS8LtiCriZ8vHzfoGAqpLIEjSvOfBbfIA0YxVltSCjhZGFNE6guZfpNTallx0NMd2_9oMY6EmtOPqDh_YRfCC_5cqvJok1wWMcFze3AB_gdotGKbWYoa0oD-JHyBuyQLO-QR8ItbKSsfbqvOyD2Dj525VnQ9ODoeDuG6fowOgyGyTScV3OmFQHYx3g21kBfu_XDGCQd35ZTysvsa9rs2b3RQt1IllqLaANaVhXuDqQj5-lfdvCmMGqm5SuhY_joULhtFh1yUA9GGm6l2AGyVFsOp9Chv5AdcNlex9BvNDMUdz2xFiqjPPg_T5NmOVBUDF2mCc49ie5a2Q1ycYcmc1Ea3LVWgtxBmbSfrR6X9F-3HR-38oa3XF1Qw_llE65F5W8WVwsy66MnHjVHK0Vm6fV_SB9Gfrk_M8K69dqnlTRZEDS_Hzrcsnfp52aE_Zo%3D)**

Our best hope for the future of this nation rests in our ability to stop the Democrats and their disastrous agenda with historic victories in next year's pivotal 2022 Midterm Elections.

We only need to wrest one seat from the Chuck Schumer Democrats to return conservative leadership to the U.S. Senate - **[and I'm counting on the support of grassroots conservatives like you to help us do it!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=77f7f152aa2a4f6cb90e5d89c99c4ef7&_e=DMvxZ9XCCnIiTlP_f_trhokY5PdWdMftAJR6RSNZDBFuSTS8LtiCriZ8vHzfoGAqpLIEjSvOfBbfIA0YxVltSCjhZGFNE6guZfpNTallx0NMd2_9oMY6EmtOPqDh_YRfCC_5cqvJok1wWMcFze3AB_gdotGKbWYoa0oD-JHyBuyQLO-QR8ItbKSsfbqvOyD2Dj525VnQ9ODoeDuG6fowOgyGyTScV3OmFQHYx3g21kBfu_XDGCQd35ZTysvsa9rs2b3RQt1IllqLaANaVhXuDgQuLnH5ow6gQoyRpljfvbhf0YBC8AWup4HuU2feOogZCdOQpkSq4hDWKu4YTDjVD-SmlKX3c46t3SmU5gA8i6HD50uXaphZOWb42cdqduTFFnlAmo7I8JP_Vm5uCc4YgxMOjc2yQEA-WvFSY99L8JPe3rmZFsghlQHM9Vc7OBimYR6RjvysasufvImoPPYxvWhS75iSA5V9lpIKF8BHHUY%3D)**

**Fellow American, since Election Day last November, I've provided more than $5 million to the National Republican Senatorial Committee and Senate candidates to help retake the majority. With your help, _we will take that support to a whole new level_.**
