Let's bring the amazingly bad Biden-Harris-Schumer Democrat agenda to a screeching halt! Support our GOP fight to Reclaim the Majority today! | Fellow American, President Joe Biden's first six months in office have been amazingly bad. Our southern border with Mexico is in chaos. We are seeing the highest levels of illegal immigration in 21 years with Customs and Border Patrol officers apprehending more than 1 million migrants crossing the border this fiscal year. In Afghanistan, where U.S. forces are completing a pullout, the radical Islamic insurgents of the Taliban are on the rise, executing prisoners and threatening to reconquer the entire country. Meanwhile, China continues its aggressive military modernization program, flexing its muscles in the South China Sea, threatening Taiwan and our allies in the western Pacific. Here at home , bad policies, massive spending, and tax increase proposals are driving up prices and inflation for workers and families, while raising the national debt above $28 trillion. | Fellow American, I'm sure you'll agree - the Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security, and we MUST reclaim our crucial Republican Senate Majority to pull our country out of this leftist tailspin. That's why I founded the RECLAIM THE MAJORITY project, Our best hope for the future of this nation rests in our ability to stop the Democrats and their disastrous agenda with historic victories in next year's pivotal 2022 Midterm Elections. We only need to wrest one seat from the Chuck Schumer Democrats to return conservative leadership to the U.S. Senate - Fellow American, since Election Day last November, I've provided more than $5 million to the National Republican Senatorial Committee and Senate candidates to help retake the majority. It was the unprecedented outpouring of support from conservatives like you that made it possible for me to defeat the most expensive challenge in U.S. Senate election history, but Republicans running in key races next year across the nation will need the same kind of extraordinary support to emerge victorious. clean_body: I wanted to give you another chance to sign my appeal to show your commitment to stopping the radical left. As your Attorney General, I’ve served a Friend, I wanted to give you another chance to sign my appeal to show your commitment to stopping the radical left. As your Attorney General, I’ve served as a much-needed firewall between the Sunflower State and the radical left’s national agenda. As your Governor, I’ll do everything in my power to guarantee that policies like Medicare for All and the Green New Deal STOP at the Kansas border. When the Obama administration tried to force its agenda on Kansans, I sued, took our fight to the Supreme Court, and won. Now, when the Biden administration’s dangerous policies threaten our values, I push back – just like I’m doing now to combat critical race theory and the Green New Deal. But before I do that, I need to know that you’re in this fight with me. I need you to join me in putting Kansans AHEAD of the Radical Left by signing your name: SIGN THE APPEAL STOP THE RADICAL LEFT Supporter: Status: NO RESPONSE –Derek Schmidt \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, You see it on the national news every single day. The radical left is completely unhinged. Trusted conservative voices are being cancelled and erased from the public sphere. Government bureaucrats are pushing for liberal talking points to become school lesson plans. Plans are being drawn up to keep spending and spending until taxes on families and businesses go through the roof. But that’s not all I’m concerned about... Some extreme Washington politicians are trying to do away with your current healthcare plan and push every American into a government-run Medicare for All-style insurance scheme. They want to implement the Green New Deal, impose burdensome regulations on our farmers and ranchers, and join international climate change agreements that shackle America while leaving China free to build new coal plants at a record-setting pace... while you foot the bill. Kansas needs a firewall. The Sunflower State needs a leader to stand firm in between our families and businesses, and the radical politicians in Washington trying to dictate how we live our lives. As attorney general, I have a long record of standing up against dangerous liberal policies. I even took the Obama-Biden administration to court repeatedly – and won. As governor, I will fight tooth and nail to protect Kansas from the damage being done by the Socialist Pelosi-Schumer-AOC crowd in Washington. SIGN THE PETITION STOP THE RADICAL LEFT Supporter: - Status: NO RESPONSE I need to know that as national Democrats plot to take their liberalism to every corner of our state, you stand ready to stop its spread into Kansas. If you’re on the same page, and I hope you are, I really hope to hear from you. –Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

***_No response will result in assumption of support for Stacy Abrams_**

Let’s be honest, Peter, **Stacey Abrams is not the individual who legislatures around the country should be listening to when it comes to voting rights – Stacey still hasn’t conceded the fact that she lost the 2018 Georgia governor’s race**.

**Now, she’s set her sights on raising huge sums of money for Senate Democrats as they work to pass legislation that would all but guarantee their hold on the Senate majority – quite literally forever.**

We’re a nation of laws, and **every citizen has the right to vote**. But as with everything, our country works better when we follow the law. **Everyone should have to show an ID to vote.** And just because polls aren’t open 24 hours in Republican controlled states doesn’t indicate racism is at play. **Heck, President Biden’s home state of Delaware doesn’t even currently offer early voting!!**

Dear Friend,

We have **less than one week** to elect a strong conservative in Texas and send a loud message to the Establishment hacks who run rampant in Washington DC.

That’s **less than one week** to get the word out about conservative **Susan Wright** , who has been endorsed by Donald Trump.

[**Chip in now to make sure conservative Susan Wright wins.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=56ae73a6410c41e5adaf057a3a18c103&_e=DQYw7YDOA9seEodzL6r5kxNfbwLKZ1_M26ZoCZ6ghzGSe-Z4KE_vPjJS75iIK1X96M6EWIn-KEgIurenvkSa5aW8QFsEj45HgMI1nFJkr0CwFkZ1ZosnJF0sD9_BRXV4RCWKKfHxh3bPYlzQXjZQgd6T75b8irsGr-fwpmCMUcLhE48c5f_skVE02wmQaOn8Dl6pL_kQZAqZ9mgOyjr1sPgmsIJDB2vsEz8hXibW40QMSIEjbs9se8nQJLAaVj_cbtki8ysNySGOozGtaQ17av9Wn-qnnMdlaQgdTDJhxALvdfm_3v6hkZl48dhUW9nh)
You see, conservative Republican Susan Wright is running in a **special election on July 27** against the Democrats’ favorite Republican.

Jake Ellzey calls himself a “Republican,” BUT he’s been endorsed by Democrats and votes like a Democrat.

**Get this** – Jake Ellzey said he wouldn’t support new taxes, **but then he got to Austin and voted with Democrats to increase taxes.**

**Now get this** – Jake Ellzey missed more than 100 votes in the state legislature, **but managed to show up for work to vote for a tax hike.**

If Jake Ellzey loves tax hikes so much, just imagine what a nightmare he would be if he gets to Congress.

That’s why we need to do everything in our power to make sure Jake Ellzey DOESN’T win.

President Biden just celebrated his SIXTH MONTH in office.

* * *
We're breathing a sigh of relief.

**We are SO PROUD of everything President Biden has accomplished with our Democratic Majorities during his first six months in office.**

Despite all the destruction Trump and his Republicans caused, President Biden has made amazing progress to get our country back on track -- including:

\-- proposing **INCREDIBLE** expansions to Social Security and Medicare
\-- signing legislation to cut child poverty in **HALF**
\-- and delivering COVID relief for **MILLIONS** of Americans

We are over the moon with the progress we've made in the past six months.

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: “Temporary” Reprieve Extended for Five Groups of Illegal Immigrants; Yemenis the Latest
body:
In its short tenure the Biden administration has extended a special reprieve for five different groups of illegal immigrants living in the U.S.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | July 21, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56236&L=25415&F=H&)

# [“Temporary” Reprieve Extended for Five Groups of Illegal Immigrants; Yemenis the Latest](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56236&L=25415&F=H&)
In its short tenure the Biden administration has extended a special reprieve for five different groups of illegal immigrants living in the U.S. The most recent was renewed a few days ago for thousands of people from Yemen, the Middle Eastern Islamic nation well known as an Al Qaeda breeding ground. Officially, the provisional amnesty is known as Temporary Protected Status (TPS), a humanitarian measure designed to shield undocumented aliens from deportation during emergencies. It is supposed to be a short-term solution for foreign nationals that do not quality as refugees but cannot immediately return home because of difficulties caused by factors such as violence, natural disasters, or political and economic instability. TPS, which is typically granted in 18-month increments, not only protects foreign nationals from deportation it also allows them to work in the U.S.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56236&L=25415&F=H&)
|

| |

### [Judicial Watch to Court: Gender Quota Requirement for Corporate Boards is Gender Discrimination ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56236&L=25416&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZ2VuZGVyLXF1b3RhLWRpc2NyaW1pbmF0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzIxMjIyMjQz) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch filed the lawsuit in Los Angeles County Superior Court on August 6, 2019, on behalf of three California taxpayers. The 2018 law, known as Senate Bill 826, requires every publicly held corporation headquartered in California to have at least one director “who self-identifies her gender as a woman” on its board of directors by December 31, 2019. The law requires corporations have up to three such persons on their boards by December 31, 2021, depending on the size of the board. The taxpayers challenging the provision claim that the quota violates the Equal Protection clause of the California Constitution. Fellow American,

Here’s a question for you: Why would Nancy Pelosi VETO Jim Jordan from being a part of her prized January 6th committee?

Is it because:
1. She will do anything in her power to stop the voices of conservatives from being heard.

2. She would rather have “followers” on her committee than independent thinkers who are determined to get to the truth, or ..

3. Her January 6th Select Committee isn’t about getting to the truth ... it’s actually all about politics

The correct answer is D: “ALL OF THE ABOVE.”

Here’s what Nancy Pelosi neglected to include in her “veto message”: Right now in Pelosi’s America, **the retirement accounts of hardworking Americans on shaky ground** ... crime is on the rise...illegals are crossing the border...inflation is looming...and **able-bodied Americans choosing unemployment benefits over work**.

Pelosi wants to divert people’s attention from the fact that the economy is literally falling apart on her watch, so she’s decided to go back to the old playbook: **attacking President Trump**.

[**STAND WITH JIM JORDAN AGAINST NANCY PELOSI ➞**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f3f303e9092e445c85f211815f5b1790&_e=TEauEPACrGIJc1b7_qax7-6UhJ9vBZ0uOvthZf5IeHJRDfL9HSwDnvJQ3vukXYnOV_9c-ti3jjmIAytSDqJMcSOHEaa8l9xeTUHsh2SKqN2VcBIHTB4w5_aVfVTgbpAddpBQsbgSsui9RIflg9-YnRxTgnCHBNp01Yt51gCqT8hVuqVQ78CAKt27KP-otG2RDi9UGgT_kPo1XHsk_nqLgn6wreFp2Ev3_1hHU2oudRYWs23LH3Xg6072KqjHu-Zp-EbFlRz73aqltT2W6I4uY_1wT30PzbRt7vzHOGAhBsv_F2d1XmcAVRWYbzaXZXNyqQFOjmahAZeiXp5ItGljEf5k1gyOUE_hkFck8_l6pW4%3D)
For her plan to work, she **MUST** silence conservatives like us. Her committee must be full of people who “go along to get along." They CANNOT challenge the company line.

If Nancy Pelosi knows one thing, **she knows that I’m a conservative who will never stop fighting for the truth** ...that I’m ready to take her and her left-wing allies head on, and I’m ready to weather every attack they throw my way.

**[I can do this because I know you, the American people, stand behind our efforts to get Congress back to work on the real problems facing our nation.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f3f303e9092e445c85f211815f5b1790&_e=TEauEPACrGIJc1b7_qax7-6UhJ9vBZ0uOvthZf5IeHJRDfL9HSwDnvJQ3vukXYnOV_9c-ti3jjmIAytSDqJMcSOHEaa8l9xeTUHsh2SKqN2VcBIHTB4w5_aVfVTgbpAddpBQsbgSsui9RIflg9-YncyiUBHUudnA09XcwAc9m5yA7TvYOoF3ImbyVQKTP2NuPOLpHv9rDaVWr8PEAyDPv45PcucA-gF3_KaQzGRmW-0_y1YZRo6A5G6OZLPFVI7lK36IeyAIisSAxG8aS8d4b0f884GavDfFnaLV5_anmIR9hwC2DC4R_YMH-aIt07Wo8mqDIGilmzAy2xZQqhLH75_OSB6sZ-TGqmznih8boCA%3D)**

clean_body: BREAKING: Speaker Pelosi just vetoed me from serving on her Select Committee "investigating" January 6th. She wants to silence me. . Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow American, Here’s a question for you: Why would Nancy Pelosi VETO Jim Jordan from being a part of her prized January 6th committee? Is it because: 1. She will do anything in her power to stop the voices of conservatives from being heard. 2. She would rather have “followers” on her committee than independent thinkers who are determined to get to the truth, or .. 3. Her January 6th Select Committee isn’t about getting to the truth ... it’s actually all about politics The correct answer is D: “ALL OF THE ABOVE.” Here’s what Nancy Pelosi neglected to include in her “veto message”: Right now in Pelosi’s America, the retirement accounts of hardworking Americans on shaky ground ... crime is on the rise...illegals are crossing the border...inflation is looming...and able-bodied Americans choosing unemployment benefits over work. Pelosi wants to divert people’s attention from the fact that the economy is literally falling apart on her watch, so she’s decided to go back to the old playbook: attacking President Trump. For her plan to work, she MUST silence conservatives like us. Her committee must be full of people who “go along to get along." They CANNOT challenge the company line. If Nancy Pelosi knows one thing, she knows that I’m a conservative who will never stop fighting for the truth ...that I’m ready to take her and her left-wing allies head on, and I’m ready to weather every attack they throw my way. She might have vetoed me from her committee, but I’m not stopping my fight for the truth. Sincerely, Jim Jordan | | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

clean_body: Let’s make our FIRST month our strongest of the entire campaign. | Friend, I couldn’t be more proud of my husband. I can personally tell you that after serving our country, Wesley is the most dedicated and driven individual I have ever known. It’s also why he’s set such an ambitious goal of raising$500,000 in just our first month of the campaign to ensure we win. So I’m reaching out to Wesley’s closest friends and top supporters to to help meet his goal. There’s no doubt about it, Friend, this race will be one of the top congressional races in the country. And I know Wesley has the determination to WIN. Wesley is not just fighting to win this key House seat, he’s fighting to ensure that our daughters grow up in the same Houston --and the same America \-- that we know and love. But with so much on the line, the Democrats will spend every last dollar to try and torpedo my husband’s campaign from the start. That’s why it’s so important to Wesley that we make this very first month our best of the whole race. Thank you, Emily Hunt 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Friend,
**I was extremely honored when I received President Trump’s Endorsement to unseat Lisa Murkowski! **
I sent President Trump a short note to graciously thank him for his STRONG Endorsement and support and his unwavering commitment to a strong Alaska! This week, I received a message back and he has a simple message for us – __**WIN!**__
**And that’s what we’re going to do! **
[_**Now more than ever, I am going to need you to help us WIN and DEFEAT Lisa Murkowski once and for all! Will you chip in just $5, $10, $25, or even $50 today to help ensure we have the resources to spread our America First message across Alaska? >>>

Because they know she’s rejected Alaska for too long!** She’s caved to Joe Biden and the Radical Left’s Socialist agenda at every turn! Our jobs, economy, and way of life are all at risk under her poor leadership.
Even with all the momentum on our side, we must not let up! We have to keep up with Murkowski! The DC Insiders are backing her at every turn because they know she’s a reliable vote for them, not our Conservative values.

clean_body: | | | | Check out this awesome note! Friend, I was extremely honored when I received President Trump’s Endorsement to unseat Lisa Murkowski! I sent President Trump a short note to graciously thank him for his STRONG Endorsement and support and his unwavering commitment to a strong Alaska! This week, I received a message back and he has a simple message for us – WIN! And that’s what we’re going to do! A new poll shows that only 6% of Alaska Republicans have a favorable view of Murkowski! Because they know she’s rejected Alaska for too long! She’s caved to Joe Biden and the Radical Left’s Socialist agenda at every turn! Our jobs, economy, and way of life are all at risk under her poor leadership. Even with all the momentum on our side, we must not let up! We have to keep up with Murkowski! The DC Insiders are backing her at every turn because they know she’s a reliable vote for them, not our Conservative values. Thanks, Kelly Tshibaka P.S. –– Team Kelly needs Conservatives like you to join the fight! | | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=20Royer?=
subject: Headin' down to the Valley and I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by KTBBH PAC
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c2bf4231dcb9/headin-down-to-the-valley-and-i-need-your-help?e=76fc145c69)
---
| | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=cf3b69c7c0&e=76fc145c69)
---
| |
---
| Hey there Derek

This weekend, I'm going to be heading back to Harrisonburg, VA (location of my Alma Mater, James Madison University, Roll Dukes) with a bunch of our fellow activists for a summit and to help stump for our Democratic candidates out in rural Virginia.

Now it's no secret that Democrats are having a hard time in rural VA and they need our help. But what you may not know is that there are a lot of progressive voters and candidates down there as well. [Bernie Sanders even won several different areas out in Rural Virginia during the Presidential Primaries](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=aadd9f3c84&e=76fc145c69) in 2016 and 2020.

So I want to help bring them something as well. [Think you could help me out? ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=eb5304340d&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=81380b06e8&e=76fc145c69)
---
| Our fellow Virginias out in the Valley, Southside, and Southwest are hurting too. Far travel times to Medical Centers, lack of connectivity due to lack of rural broadband, intrusive pipeline construction, and the loss of jobs have decimated our once thriving Shenandoah Valley and Southwest Virginia. But if we have the right people in office, we can see affordable and accessible healthcare, rural broadband connectivity, mass transit, sustainable agriculture, economic justice, environmental justice, and jobs return to places like Wytheville, Staunton, all the way to Danville.
[Chip in to the fund so I can pass it along to them. ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=94c53b3611&e=76fc145c69)
It's true that when one of us thrives, we all thrive. But the same is true in reverse. If one of us falls back, we all fall back. So that's why I am going down there this weekend to help out, stump for these great candidates, and knock on some doors. They're up against some big competition but I know that we can help out. [Giving just $5, $25, $50, or however much you can right now can make a world of a difference, so how about sending that today? ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=449eb94040&e=76fc145c69)

I greatly appreciate all the help we have gotten so far and I know that we can continue to do big things come November and help continue to deliver not just for parts of Virginia, but for all of Virginia

[Rush your donation here. ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=cb2c2e7479&e=76fc145c69)
---
|
---
|
In Solidarity,

Matt Royer

---
| [HELP OUT](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=4af040dceb&e=76fc145c69 "HELP OUT")
